content.text:
**Translation:** "Why can't I push to a project I created myself on the web? I cloned it down but can't commit. The error says 'You are not allowed to push code to this project' with a 403 error."

---

操，这个问题挺常见的，爹。403 说明认证或权限有问题。来，逐个排查：

## 可能原因

### 1. Git 远程 URL 用的是 HTTPS，但凭证不对
你 clone 下来的 URL 是 HTTPS 的，推送时 Git 用的凭证可能不对（比如缓存了别的账号的凭证）。

检查一下：
```bash
git remote -v
```

### 2. GitLab 项目权限问题
虽然是你在网页上建的，但有可能：
- 项目创建在了某个 **Group** 下，而你在那个 Group 里的角色不是 Maintainer/Owner
- 项目的 **Protected branches** 设置阻止了你推送

### 3. 凭证缓存了错误的账号

---

## 解决方案

**先试最简单的 —— 重新设置远程 URL，带上用户名：**

```bash
git remote set-url origin https://luobeilin@pt-gitlab.yottastudios.com/luobeilin/survey-king.git
```

然后再 `git push`，它会提示你输密码，输入你的密码 `Pwz1991926`。

**如果还不行，清一下 Windows 凭证：**
1. 打开 **控制面板 → 凭据管理器 → Windows 凭据**
2. 找到 `pt-gitlab.yottastudios.com` 相关的条目，删掉
3. 重新 `git push`，输入用户名 `luobeilin` 和密码

**如果还是 403，去 GitLab 网页上确认：**
1. 打开项目 → **Settings → Members**，确认你的角色是 **Owner** 或 **Maintainer**
2. 打开 **Settings → Repository → Protected branches**，看 `master` 分支是否只允许特定角色推送

---

## 改动总结

这次没有代码改动，纯排查 Git 403 推送权限问题。最可能的原因是 HTTPS 凭证缓存了错误的账号，设置带用户名的 remote URL 或清除 Windows 凭证管理器里的旧凭证应该能解决。

content.text:
操，我这边环境有限制，没法直接帮你执行 `git push`。但排查结果已经出来了，爹：

## 排查结果

1. **Remote URL** — 原来没带用户名，已经帮你改好了：
   - 之前：`https://pt-gitlab.yottastudios.com/luobeilin/survey-king.git`
   - 现在：`https://luobeilin@pt-gitlab.yottastudios.com/luobeilin/survey-king.git`

2. **凭证管理器** — 用的 Windows `manager`，可能缓存了别的账号的凭证

## 你手动操作

在终端里跑这个：

```bash
git push -u origin master
```

如果弹出密码框，输入密码 `Pwz1991926`。

**如果还是 403**，去清 Windows 凭证：
1. **Win + S** 搜 "凭据管理器" → **Windows 凭据**
2. 找 `pt-gitlab.yottastudios.com` 相关的，删掉
3. 再跑 `git push -u origin master`，重新输用户名密码

---

## 改动总结

帮你把 git remote URL 加上了用户名 `luobeilin@`，这样推送时 Git 会用正确的账号认证。你需要手动执行 `git push` 命令。

# 🎯 卷王 SurveyKing




🏠 官方网站 | 📚 部署文档 | 📖 操作手册 | 🎮 演示问卷 | 🤖 AI文档

[简体中文](./README.md) | [English](./README.en-us.md) ## 🚀 AI 驱动的开源问卷考试系统 ### ✨ 核心亮点 - 🤖 **AI 智能创建** - 业界首创 AI 问卷生成，自然语言描述即可生成专业问卷 - 📊 **20+ 题型支持** - 覆盖填空、选择、矩阵、签名等所有主流题型 - 🎯 **强大逻辑引擎** - 支持复杂的显示隐藏、跳转、计算等业务逻辑 - 📱 **全平台适配** - 完美适配 PC、移动端、微信小程序等所有终端 - ⚡ **一键部署** - 最快 1 分钟完成系统部署，支持 Docker、宝塔等多种方式 ### 🎯 快速体验 | 功能 | 演示链接 | 描述 | | -------------- | ---------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------- | | 🤖 AI 创建问卷 | [立即体验](https://wj.surveyking.cn/s/start) | 用自然语言描述需求，AI 秒生成专业问卷 | | 📋 调查问卷 | [在线演示](https://pro.surveyking.cn/s/survey) | 体验完整的问卷调查流程 | | ✅ 在线考试 | [考试演示](https://pro.surveyking.cn/s/exam) | 体验智能组卷、自动评分等功能 | | 📊 功能清单 | [详细功能](https://docs.qq.com/sheet/DZEVveUVMSHpVZkJw) | 查看系统完整功能列表 | ### 💬 社区支持 🌟 **您的 Star 是我们前进的动力！** 右上角点 ⭐ Star 支持项目发展 > 📱 **QQ 交流群**：Q1群: 338461197(满) | Q2群: 1074277968(满) | Q3群: 770779467(满) | Q4群: 92878557(满) | **Q5群: 980962382** ✨ ## 快速开始(一键部署) ### 🚀 1 分钟快速体验调查问卷系统(无需安装数据库) 1. 下载卷王快速体验安装包(加群) 2. 解压，双击运行 start.bat 3. 打开浏览器访问 [http://localhost:1991](http://localhost:1991)，输入账号密码： _admin_/_123456_ ### 宝塔一键部署 [使用宝塔快速一键部署，部署更方便，运维更简单](https://surveyking.cn/open-source/deploy/baota-simple-deploy) ### 一键 docker 部署 ```bash # 一键启动，默认使用的是内置的 h2 数据库 docker run -d -p 1991:1991 surveyking/surveyking # 如果 surveyking/surveyking 无法拉取，可以使用阿里云的镜像库 docker run -d -p 1991:1991 registry.cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/surveyking/surveyking:latest # 挂载文件目录和日志文件 docker run -d -p 1991:1991 -v ${PWD}/files:/app/files -v ${PWD}/logs:/app/logs surveyking/surveyking # 使用外置 mysql 数据库，系统启动时会自动导入初始 sql docker run -e PROFILE=mysql \ -v ${PWD}/logs:/app/logs \ -v ${PWD}/files:/app/files \ -e MYSQL_PASS=surveyking \ -e MYSQL_USER=surveyking \ -e DB_URL='jdbc:mysql://172.17.0.1:3306/surveyking?rewriteBatchedStatements=true&useUnicode=true&characterEncoding=UTF-8' \ -p 1991:1991 \ surveyking/surveyking ``` ## 🌟 核心特性 ### 🤖 AI 智能创建功能 - **🎯 自然语言生成** - 支持通过自然语言描述直接生成专业问卷，如"创建一个产品满意度调查" - **🔧 多模型支持** - 集成 SiliconFlow 平台，支持 DeepSeek、Qwen、Llama 等多种主流 AI 模型 - **⚡ 实时生成** - AI 流式输出，实时预览问卷生成过程，所见即所得 - **🎨 智能优化** - AI 自动优化问题逻辑、题型选择和问卷结构 ### 📋 丰富的题型和功能 - 🥇 **20+ 题型支持** - 填空、选择、下拉、级联、矩阵、分页、签名、题组、上传、[横向填空](https://wj.surveyking.cn/s/EMqvs7)等全覆盖 - 🎉 **多种创建方式** - AI 智能创建、Excel 导入、文本导入、在线编辑器等多种方式任选 - 💪 **灵活问卷设置** - 白名单答卷、公开查询、答卷限制、定时发布等高级功能 - 📊 **强大逻辑引擎** - 可视化配置问卷跳转和显示逻辑，支持复杂公式计算（超越主流商业系统） ### 📈 数据分析与报表 - 🎇 **全面数据管理** - 问卷数据新增、编辑、标记、导出、打印、预览和附件打包下载 - 🎨 **智能报表生成** - 实时统计分析，支持条形图、柱形图、扇形图等多种图表展示 - 📤 **多格式导出** - 支持 Excel、PDF、图片等多种格式的数据和报表导出 ### 🚀 部署与技术特性 - ⚡ **极简部署** - 最快 1 分钟完成部署，支持 Windows 一键、Docker、宝塔、K8s 等多种部署方式 - 📱 **全平台适配** - 响应式设计，完美适配 PC、移动端、平板等所有设备 - 👥 **协作与权限** - 多人协作管理、完善的 RBAC 权限控制、组织架构管理 - 💾 **数据库兼容** - 支持 MySQL、PostgreSQL、H2 等所有主流关系型数据库 - 🔒 **企业级安全** - 安全、可靠、稳定的后端架构，支持高并发场景 ### 🧠 高级逻辑引擎（业界领先） 卷王的逻辑设置功能远超主流商业问卷系统，支持以下十大逻辑类型： - **显示隐藏逻辑** - 根据条件动态显示或隐藏问题 - **值计算逻辑** - 动态计算问题答案，支持从简单的 BMI 计算到复杂的多问题组合运算 - **文本替换逻辑** - 动态替换题目内容，实现个性化问卷 - **值校验逻辑** - 基于其他问题答案进行当前问题有效性验证 - **必填逻辑** - 动态判断问题是否必填 - **选项自动勾选逻辑** - 根据其他问题答案自动勾选选项 - **选项显示隐藏逻辑** - 动态控制选项的显示和隐藏 - **结束问卷逻辑** - 根据条件提前结束问卷 - **跳转逻辑** - 智能跳转到指定问题或页面 - **自定义提示和跳转** - 根据答案或分数显示不同提示语、跳转不同链接 ### 🎯 考试系统专属功能 - 🏆 **智能组卷** - AI 辅助题库组卷，自动平衡难度分布 - ⏱️ **自动评分** - 实时计算分数，支持多种计分规则 - 📊 **成绩统计** - 详细的考试数据分析和成绩报表 - 🔄 **题目随机** - 支持题目和选项随机排序，防止作弊 ## 🏆 产品对比优势 | | 问卷网 | 腾讯问卷 | 问卷星 | 金数据 | 卷王 SurveyKing | | -------------------- | ------- | -------- | ------- | ------- | ---------------------- | | 📋 问卷调查 | ✔️ | ✔️ | ✔️ | ✔️ | ✔️ | | ✅ 在线考试 | ✔️ | ✔️ | ✔️ | ✔️ | ✔️ | | 🗳️ 投票评选 | ✔️ | ✔️ | ✔️ | ✔️ | ✔️ | | 📝 支持题型 | 🥇 | 🥉 | 🥇 | 🥈 | **🥇 20+ 题型** | | ⚙️ 题型设置 | 🥇 | 🥉 | 🥇 | 🥇 | **🥇 最灵活** | | 🧮 自动计算 | 🥉 | 🥉 | 🥉 | 🥈 | **🥇 最强大** | | 🧠 逻辑设置 | 🥈 | 🥈 | 🥈 | 🥈 | **🥇 十大逻辑** | | ✅ 自定义校验 | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ | **✔️ 独有** | | 📤 自定义导出 | 🥈 | ❌ | ❌ | 🥉 | **🥇 最丰富** | | 📱 手机端编辑 | ✔️ | ✔️ | ✔️ | ✔️ | ✔️ | | 🔍 公开查询 | ✔️ | ❌ | ✔️ | ❌ | ✔️ | | 🏠**私有部署** | 💰💰💰 | 💰💰💰 | 💰💰💰 | 💰💰💰 | **🆓 完全免费** | | ⚡ 部署难度 | 🥉 复杂 | 🥉 复杂 | 🥉 复杂 | 🥉 复杂 | **🥇 1分钟部署** | | 🔓 开源协议 | ❌ 闭源 | ❌ 闭源 | ❌ 闭源 | ❌ 闭源 | **✔️ MIT** | > 💡 **对比说明**：上表对比的均为商业问卷产品，各有特色值得学习。卷王作为开源产品，**在 AI 功能、私有部署、开源协议方面具有绝对优势**。 > > 🎯 **核心优势**：**全球首个 AI 驱动的开源问卷系统**，让问卷创建从此告别繁琐操作！ ### 🤖 AI 功能详细介绍 #### 🎯 使用场景示例 ``` 用户输入："创建一个员工满意度调查问卷" AI 输出：自动生成包含工作环境、薪酬福利、职业发展等维度的专业问卷 ``` #### 🔧 技术特点 - **多模型支持** - 集成 DeepSeek、Qwen、Llama 等主流 AI 模型 - **流式输出** - 实时显示生成过程，支持中途调整 - **智能优化** - 自动优化问题逻辑和题型选择 - **快速上手** - 无需 AI 知识，自然语言描述即可 #### ⚙️ 配置简单 管理员只需在后台配置 AI Token，用户即可在创建问卷时选择 "AI 智能创建" 功能。 ## 📸 产品截图预览 ### 🤖 AI 智能创建功能 ![1754896884542](image/README/1754896884542.png) ### 📋 问卷系统功能 ## ✨ 友情推荐 [专注于中台化架构的低代码生成工具](https://gitee.com/orangeform/orange-admin) ## 📸 更多截图 - 考试系统预览
- 调查问卷预览

FROM openjdk:8-jdk-alpine
ARG JAR_FILE=build/libs/*.jar
COPY ${JAR_FILE} app.jar
COPY surveyking.mv.db surveyking.mv.db 
RUN mkdir /surveyking
VOLUME /files
VOLUME /logs
ENTRYPOINT ["sh", "-c", "java ${JAVA_OPTS} -jar /app.jar ${0} ${@}"]

file.content:
plugins {
    id 'java'
}

version 'unspecified'

repositories {
    mavenCentral()
}

dependencies {
    implementation 'org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-starter-cache'
    implementation 'org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-starter-aop'
    annotationProcessor "org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-autoconfigure-processor"
    annotationProcessor "org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-configuration-processor"
    implementation 'com.anji-plus:spring-boot-starter-captcha'

    implementation 'org.dhatim:fastexcel:0.12.13'
    implementation 'org.dhatim:fastexcel-reader:0.12.3'
    implementation 'io.jsonwebtoken:jjwt-api:0.11.2'
    runtimeOnly 'io.jsonwebtoken:jjwt-impl:0.11.2'
    implementation 'io.jsonwebtoken:jjwt-jackson:0.11.2'

    implementation 'com.google.zxing:javase:3.5.0'
    implementation 'net.coobird:thumbnailator:0.4.14'
    implementation 'com.github.ben-manes.caffeine:caffeine:2.9.2'
    implementation 'com.belerweb:pinyin4j:2.5.0'

    testImplementation 'org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-starter-test'
    testImplementation 'org.springframework.security:spring-security-test'
}

test {
    useJUnitPlatform()
}

file.content:
server:
  port: 7007
  servlet:
    session:
      timeout: 1h
  compression:
    enabled: true
    min-response-size: 1024
file-storage:
  local:
    root-path: ./files
    # set the file path
    pathStrategy: byId
    dateFormat: yyyyMM/dd
    nameStrategy: seqAndOriginalName
custom-cache:
  entries:
    projectCache: 1d
    fileCache: 1h
    userCache: 1h
    deptCache: 1d
    projectPermissionCache: 1d
    commonCache: 30d

file.content:
version: 1.10.0
spring:
  application:
    name: survey
  profiles:
    active: @activeProfile@ # maven 配置
#    active: ${activeProfile} # gradle 配置
  mvc:
    async:
      request-timeout: -1
    static-path-pattern: /notfound # 覆盖默认的 /**
    throw-exception-if-no-handler-found: true
    pathmatch:
      matching-strategy: ant_path_matcher
  servlet:
    multipart:
      max-file-size: 2048MB
      max-request-size: 2048MB
  jackson:
    default-property-inclusion: non_null # 序列化忽略空值
    date-format: yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss
    time-zone: GMT+8
    serialization:
      FAIL_ON_EMPTY_BEANS: false
    deserialization:
      FAIL_ON_UNKNOWN_PROPERTIES: false # 反序列化时允许未知属性
sk:
  security:
    url-token-authentication:
      enabled: true # 默认开启 url token 认证
flowable:
  async-executor-activate: false
  database-schema-update: false

aj:
  captcha:
    jigsaw: classpath:images/jigsaw # 滑动验证，底图路径，不配置将使用默认图片；以 classpath: 开头，取 resource 目录下路径
    pic-click: classpath:images/pic-click # 滑动验证，底图路径，不配置将使用默认图片；以 classpath: 开头，取 resource 目录下路径
    cache-type: local # 缓存 local/redis...
    cache-number: 1000 # local 缓存的阈值,达到这个值，清除缓存
    timing-clear: 180 # local定时清除过期缓存(单位秒),设置为0代表不执行
    type: blockPuzzle # 验证码类型 default两种都实例化。 blockPuzzle 滑块拼图 clickWord 文字点选
    water-mark: survey # 右下角水印文字(我的水印)，可使用 https://tool.chinaz.com/tools/unicode.aspx 中文转 Unicode，Linux 可能需要转 unicode
    interference-options: 2 # 滑动干扰项(0/1/2)
    req-frequency-limit-enable: false # 接口请求次数一分钟限制是否开启 true|false
    req-get-lock-limit: 5 # 验证失败5次，get接口锁定
    req-get-lock-seconds: 10 # 验证失败后，锁定时间间隔
    req-get-minute-limit: 30 # get 接口一分钟内请求数限制
    req-check-minute-limit: 60 # check 接口一分钟内请求数限制
    req-verify-minute-limit: 60 # verify 接口一分钟内请求数限制

api:
  prefix: /api

surveyking:
  ai:
    siliconflow:
      enabled: true
      base-url: https://api.siliconflow.cn
      token: ${AI_SILICONFLOW_TOKEN:your_token}
      model-id: deepseek-chat
      model-types:
        - display-name: "DeepSeek Chat"
          value: "deepseek-chat"
          description: "DeepSeek 对话模型"
        - display-name: "Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct"
          value: "Qwen/Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct"
          description: "Qwen2.5 72B 指令模型"
        - display-name: "Llama-3.1-70B-Instruct"
          value: "meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3.1-70B-Instruct"
          description: "Llama 3.1 70B 指令模型"

# 配置文件不能放在根目录下面，否则会被 api 的 application-dev.yml 覆盖
spring:
  h2:
    enabled:
      true console:
  datasource:
#    username: sa
#    password: sa
#    url: jdbc:h2:tcp://localhost/~/survey
#    driver-class-name: org.h2.Driver
    username: root
    password: 123456
    url: jdbc:mysql://localhost:3306/surveyking?rewriteBatchedStatements=true&useUnicode=true&characterEncoding=UTF-8
    driver-class-name: com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver
mybatis-plus:
  configuration:
    log-impl: org.apache.ibatis.logging.stdout.StdOutImpl
    call-setters-on-nulls: false
  global-config:
    db-config:
      logic-delete-field: deleted

  global-config:
    db-config:
      logic-delete-field: deleted

input.content:
# CLAUDE.md

This file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository.

## Project Overview

SurveyKing (卷王) — AI-driven open-source survey and exam system. Supports 20+ question types, complex logic engine, AI-powered survey generation (via SiliconFlow API), and workflow (Flowable).

## Architecture

Monorepo with three main parts:

### Server (`server/`) — Spring Boot 2.7.7 + Gradle 7.1 multi-module

Base package: `cn.surveyking.server`

| Module | Role | Key Dependencies |
|--------|------|------------------|
| **shared** | Core framework: security (JWT), exception handling, config, constants, DTOs, utils | Spring Security, Caffeine cache, fastexcel, jjwt |
| **rdbms** | Data access and service implementations (MyBatis-Plus) | mybatis-plus-boot-starter 3.5.0, MySQL connector |
| **api** | Main Spring Boot application, REST controllers (`*Api.java`), static resources | Depends on shared + rdbms + ai |
| **flow** | Workflow engine integration | Flowable 6.7.0, depends on shared + rdbms |
| **exam** | Exam module (placeholder, minimal code) | — |
| **ai** | AI chat service for survey generation | SiliconFlow API integration |

**Note:** The `ai` module exists in filesystem but is NOT listed in `settings.gradle`. The `api/build.gradle` references `project(':ai')` — you need to add `include 'ai'` to `settings.gradle` for a successful build.

**Layered architecture:**
- `api` module: Controllers (`*Api.java`) — thin REST layer
- `shared` module: Service interfaces (`domain/dto/` for DTOs), core infrastructure
- `rdbms` module: Service implementations (`impl/*ServiceImpl.java`), MyBatis mappers (`mapper/`), domain models (`domain/model/`)
- Object mapping: MapStruct (configured via annotation processors in root build.gradle)

### Client (`client/`) — Frontend (empty placeholder, no code yet)

### Website (`website/`) — Docusaurus 2.0 documentation site

## Build Commands

All server commands run from `server/` directory:

```bash
# Build (development profile)
./gradlew build -Pdev

# Build (production profile)
./gradlew build -Ppro

# Run application
./gradlew :api:bootRun

# Run tests
./gradlew test

# Run single module tests
./gradlew :rdbms:test
./gradlew :shared:test

# Code format check (Spring Java Format)
./gradlew checkFormat

# Apply code formatting
./gradlew format
```

Website commands (from `website/`):
```bash
npm start          # dev server
npm run build      # production build
```

## Configuration

- Dev profile: `server/api/src/main/resources/application-dev.yml` + `server/rdbms/src/main/resources/config/application-dev.yml`
- Prod profile: `server/api/src/main/resources/application-pro.yml` + `server/rdbms/src/main/resources/config/application-pro.yml`
- Default port: 7007 (dev)
- Default DB: MySQL (`localhost:3306/surveyking`), also supports H2 (commented out)
- Gradle wrapper dist: Tencent cloud mirror (`mirrors.cloud.tencent.com`)
- Default admin: `admin` / `123456`
- AI config: set `AI_SILICONFLOW_TOKEN` env var or configure in `application.yml` under `surveyking.ai.siliconflow`

## Key Conventions

- Web server: Undertow (not Tomcat)
- Code style: `io.spring.javaformat` plugin enforced — run `./gradlew format` before committing
- Lombok + MapStruct used together (requires `lombok-mapstruct-binding`)
- Logical delete: `deleted` field (MyBatis-Plus global config)
- API prefix: `/api`
- JSON: Jackson with `non_null` inclusion, `GMT+8` timezone
- Security: JWT token auth + URL token auth (configurable)
- Captcha: `anji-plus` sliding puzzle verification
- Constants/enums in `shared/core/constant/` — check here before creating new ones
- Exception handling: `GlobalExceptionHandler` in `shared/core/mvc/advice/`, custom exceptions in `shared/core/exception/`
- Response wrapper: `ApiResponse` and `PaginationResponse` in `shared/core/common/`

## Database

- ORM: MyBatis-Plus 3.5.0
- Init SQL: `scripts/database/survey.mv.db` (H2 format for quick start)
- Production: MySQL 8.0 recommended
- Docker: `server/api/Dockerfile` (OpenJDK 8 Alpine)

content.content: File created successfully at: D:\project\pt-gitlab\survey-king\CLAUDE.md

## 改动总结

在项目根目录创建了 `CLAUDE.md`，包含以下内容：

1. **项目概述** — SurveyKing 问卷考试系统的定位
2. **架构说明** — server 6 个 Gradle 子模块的职责和依赖关系（shared → rdbms → api，flow、ai、exam）
3. **分层架构** — Controller(api) → Service Interface(shared) → Service Impl(rdbms) 的分层模式
4. **构建命令** — Gradle build/test/format、bootRun、website 的 npm 命令
5. **配置说明** — dev/prod profile 文件位置、端口、数据库、AI 配置
6. **关键约定** — Undertow、Spring Java Format、Lombok+MapStruct、逻辑删除、JWT 认证等

另外发现一个问题：`ai` 模块在文件系统中存在，但 `settings.gradle` 没有 include 它，而 `api/build.gradle` 依赖了 `project(':ai')`，构建可能会报错。已在 CLAUDE.md 中标注。

file.content:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0"
    xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
    xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 https://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd">
    <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
    <parent>
        <groupId>cn.surveyking</groupId>
        <artifactId>survey-server</artifactId>
        <version>${revision}</version>
    </parent>
    <groupId>cn.surveyking</groupId>
    <artifactId>ai</artifactId>
    <version>${revision}</version>
    <name>ai</name>
    <description>AI Module for SurveyKing</description>

    <dependencies>
        <!-- 依赖 shared 模块 -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>cn.surveyking</groupId>
            <artifactId>shared</artifactId>
            <version>${revision}</version>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Spring WebFlux for reactive web client -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-webflux</artifactId>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Jackson for JSON processing (already included in Spring Boot) -->

        <!-- Lombok -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId>
            <artifactId>lombok</artifactId>
            <scope>provided</scope>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Test dependencies -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-test</artifactId>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>

        <dependency>
            <groupId>io.projectreactor</groupId>
            <artifactId>reactor-test</artifactId>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>
    </dependencies>

    <build>
        <plugins>
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
                <artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId>
                <configuration>
                    <skip>true</skip>
                </configuration>
            </plugin>
        </plugins>
    </build>
</project>

content.text: 根据 pom.xml 的依赖，创建对应的 `build.gradle`：

content.content: File created successfully at: D:\project\pt-gitlab\survey-king\server\ai\build.gradle

content.text:
搞定了，爹。

## 改动总结

两处改动修复这个构建错误：

1. **`server/settings.gradle`** — 添加 `include 'ai'`，把 ai 模块注册到 Gradle 多模块项目中
2. **`server/ai/build.gradle`** — 新建文件，根据原有的 `pom.xml` 翻译依赖（`shared` 模块 + `spring-boot-starter-webflux` + reactor-test）

原因是 ai 模块只有 Maven 的 `pom.xml`，没有 Gradle 的 `build.gradle`，而整个项目用的是 Gradle 构建。现在再跑 `./gradlew build` 应该能过了。

content.text: 关键错误：`Unsupported class file major version 65`。这说明你的 JDK 版本太高了（major version 65 = JDK 21），而 Gradle 7.1 最高只支持 JDK 16。

content.content:

OpenJDK Runtime Environment (build 21+35-2513)
OpenJDK 64-Bit Server VM (build 21+35-2513, mixed mode, sharing)

content.text:
果然，JDK 21。项目 Dockerfile 写的是 JDK 8，Spring Boot 2.7.7 也是 JDK 8/11/17 兼容。

有两个方案，爹：

| 方案 | 做法 | 优劣 |
|------|------|------|
| **A. 升级 Gradle** | 把 Gradle 从 7.1 升到 8.5+（支持 JDK 21） | 改动小，但可能有插件兼容问题 |
| **B. 换 JDK** | 装 JDK 11 或 17，设置 `JAVA_HOME` | 零风险，但需要你本地装低版本 JDK |

你本地有装 JDK 8/11/17 吗？还是要我升级 Gradle 版本？

content.text:
进步了！`shared` 和 `ai` 编译通过了。现在 `ai` 模块的 `bootJar` 任务报错 — 它是个 library 模块不需要 bootJar。需要禁用它。同时 Spring Boot 2.7.7 的 `bootJarMainClassName` 任务用的 ASM 不支持 JDK 21，得升级 Spring Boot。

先禁用 ai 模块的 bootJar，并且让非 api 的子模块都不执行 bootJar：
问题是根 `build.gradle` 的 `subprojects` 对所有子模块都 apply 了 `org.springframework.boot` 插件，导致每个子模块都会执行 `bootJar`。需要在非 api 子模块里禁用：

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0"
    xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 https://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd">
    <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
    <packaging>pom</packaging>
    <modules>
        <module>api</module>
        <module>shared</module>
        <module>rdbms</module>
        <module>ai</module>
        <!--        <module>flow</module>-->
    </modules>
    <parent>
        <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
        <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-parent</artifactId>
        <version>2.7.7</version>
        <relativePath/>
        <!-- lookup parent from repository -->
    </parent>
    <groupId>cn.surveyking</groupId>
    <artifactId>survey-server</artifactId>
    <version>${revision}</version>
    <name>survey-server</name>
    <description>Make a better open source survey system.</description>

    <properties>
        <java.version>1.8</java.version>
        <revision>v1.9.0</revision>
        <org.mapstruct.version>1.4.2.Final</org.mapstruct.version>
        <org.projectlombok.version>1.18.16</org.projectlombok.version>
    </properties>

    <dependencyManagement>
        <dependencies>
            <dependency>
                <groupId>org.apache.commons</groupId>
                <artifactId>commons-lang3</artifactId>
                <version>3.0</version>
            </dependency>
            <!--滑动验证码-->
            <dependency>
                <groupId>com.anji-plus</groupId>
                <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-captcha</artifactId>
                <version>1.3.0</version>
            </dependency>
            <dependency>
                <groupId>org.dhatim</groupId>
                <artifactId>fastexcel</artifactId>
                <version>0.12.13</version>
            </dependency>
            <dependency>
                <groupId>org.dhatim</groupId>
                <artifactId>fastexcel-reader</artifactId>
                <version>0.12.3</version>
            </dependency>
            <dependency>
                <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId>
                <artifactId>jjwt-api</artifactId>
                <version>0.11.2</version>
            </dependency>
            <dependency>
                <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId>
                <artifactId>jjwt-jackson</artifactId>
                <version>0.11.2</version>
            </dependency>
            <dependency>
                <groupId>net.coobird</groupId>
                <artifactId>thumbnailator</artifactId>
                <version>0.4.14</version>
            </dependency>
            <dependency>
                <groupId>com.github.ben-manes.caffeine</groupId>
                <artifactId>caffeine</artifactId>
                <version>2.9.2</version>
            </dependency>
            <dependency>
                <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId>
                <artifactId>jjwt-impl</artifactId>
                <version>0.11.2</version>
            </dependency>

            <dependency>
                <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId>
                <artifactId>lombok</artifactId>
                <version>1.16.18</version>
                <scope>provided</scope>
            </dependency>

            <dependency>
                <groupId>com.baomidou</groupId>
                <artifactId>mybatis-plus-boot-starter</artifactId>
                <version>3.5.0</version>
            </dependency>

            <dependency>
                <groupId>com.google.zxing</groupId>
                <artifactId>javase</artifactId>
                <version>3.5.0</version>
            </dependency>

            <dependency>
                <groupId>com.belerweb</groupId>
                <artifactId>pinyin4j</artifactId>
                <version>2.5.0</version>
            </dependency>

            <dependency>
                <groupId>org.mapstruct</groupId>
                <artifactId>mapstruct</artifactId>
                <version>${org.mapstruct.version}</version>
            </dependency>
        </dependencies>
    </dependencyManagement>

    <build>
        <plugins>
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>3.8.1</version>
                <configuration>
                    <source>1.8</source>
                    <target>1.8</target>
                    <annotationProcessorPaths>
                        <path>
                            <groupId>org.mapstruct</groupId>
                            <artifactId>mapstruct-processor</artifactId>
                            <version>${org.mapstruct.version}</version>
                        </path>
                        <path>
                            <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId>
                            <artifactId>lombok</artifactId>
                            <version>${org.projectlombok.version}</version>
                        </path>

                        <!-- additional annotation processor required as of Lombok 1.18.16 -->
                        <path>
                            <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId>
                            <artifactId>lombok-mapstruct-binding</artifactId>
                            <version>0.2.0</version>
                        </path>
                    </annotationProcessorPaths>

                    <compilerArgs>
                        <arg> -Amapstruct.suppressGeneratorTimestamp=true
                        </arg>
                        <arg> -Amapstruct.suppressGeneratorVersionInfoComment=true
                        </arg>
                        <arg> -Amapstruct.verbose=true
                        </arg>
                        <arg> -Amapstruct.defaultComponentModel=spring
                        </arg>
                        <arg> -Amapstruct.unmappedTargetPolicy=IGNORE
                        </arg>
                    </compilerArgs>
                </configuration>
            </plugin>
        </plugins>
    </build>
</project>

content.text: 好，Maven 构建文件齐全。但有个问题：`java.version` 是 `1.8`，Lombok 版本是 `1.16.18`（太老了），你本地 JDK 是 21。需要升级兼容性。先检查有没有 `mvn`：

content.text: Maven 3.9.9 + JDK 21。需要升级 pom.xml 里的 java.version、Lombok、maven-compiler-plugin 来兼容 JDK 21：

content.text: Lombok 1.16.18 跟 JDK 21 不兼容，需要升级。但你说别动项目，那用 Maven 命令行参数传 JVM 选项来绕过模块限制：

input.description: Maven build with JDK module opens for Lombok

content.text:
`-rf` 恢复构建时找不到 shared jar，因为 `-rf` 跳过了 shared。用 `-rf` 不行，之前的完整构建 rdbms 失败的错误是 Lombok 跟 JDK 21 不兼容。

爹，问题很明确：**项目的 Lombok 1.16.18 + JDK 21 = 不兼容**。这个没法靠命令行绕过，Lombok 1.16.18 根本没有 JDK 21 的支持代码。

只有两条路：

| 方案 | 改动 |
|------|------|
| **A. 升级 pom.xml 里的 Lombok 版本** | 只改一行：`1.16.18` → `1.18.30` |
| **B. 装 JDK 8 或 11** | 不改项目，换本地 JDK |

你选哪个？升 Lombok 版本是最小改动，完全向下兼容。

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0"
    xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 https://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd">
    <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
    <packaging>pom</packaging>
    <modules>
        <module>api</module>
        <module>shared</module>
        <module>rdbms</module>
        <module>ai</module>
        <!--        <module>flow</module>-->
    </modules>
    <parent>
        <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
        <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-parent</artifactId>
        <version>2.7.7</version>
        <relativePath/>
        <!-- lookup parent from repository -->
    </parent>
    <groupId>cn.surveyking</groupId>
    <artifactId>survey-server</artifactId>
    <version>${revision}</version>
    <name>survey-server</name>
    <description>Make a better open source survey system.</description>

    <properties>
        <java.version>1.8</java.version>
        <revision>v1.9.0</revision>
        <org.mapstruct.version>1.4.2.Final</org.mapstruct.version>
        <org.projectlombok.version>1.18.16</org.projectlombok.version>
    </properties>

    <dependencyManagement>
        <dependencies>
            <dependency>
                <groupId>org.apache.commons</groupId>
                <artifactId>commons-lang3</artifactId>
                <version>3.0</version>
            </dependency>
            <!--滑动验证码-->
            <dependency>
                <groupId>com.anji-plus</groupId>
                <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-captcha</artifactId>
                <version>1.3.0</version>
            </dependency>
            <dependency>
                <groupId>org.dhatim</groupId>
                <artifactId>fastexcel</artifactId>
                <version>0.12.13</version>
            </dependency>
            <dependency>
                <groupId>org.dhatim</groupId>
                <artifactId>fastexcel-reader</artifactId>
                <version>0.12.3</version>
            </dependency>
            <dependency>
                <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId>
                <artifactId>jjwt-api</artifactId>
                <version>0.11.2</version>
            </dependency>
            <dependency>
                <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId>
                <artifactId>jjwt-jackson</artifactId>
                <version>0.11.2</version>
            </dependency>
            <dependency>
                <groupId>net.coobird</groupId>
                <artifactId>thumbnailator</artifactId>
                <version>0.4.14</version>
            </dependency>
            <dependency>
                <groupId>com.github.ben-manes.caffeine</groupId>
                <artifactId>caffeine</artifactId>
                <version>2.9.2</version>
            </dependency>
            <dependency>
                <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId>
                <artifactId>jjwt-impl</artifactId>
                <version>0.11.2</version>
            </dependency>

            <dependency>
                <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId>
                <artifactId>lombok</artifactId>
                <version>1.16.18</version>
                <scope>provided</scope>
            </dependency>

            <dependency>
                <groupId>com.baomidou</groupId>
                <artifactId>mybatis-plus-boot-starter</artifactId>
                <version>3.5.0</version>
            </dependency>

            <dependency>
                <groupId>com.google.zxing</groupId>
                <artifactId>javase</artifactId>
                <version>3.5.0</version>
            </dependency>

            <dependency>
                <groupId>com.belerweb</groupId>
                <artifactId>pinyin4j</artifactId>
                <version>2.5.0</version>
            </dependency>

            <dependency>
                <groupId>org.mapstruct</groupId>
                <artifactId>mapstruct</artifactId>
                <version>${org.mapstruct.version}</version>
            </dependency>
        </dependencies>
    </dependencyManagement>

    <build>
        <plugins>
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>3.8.1</version>
                <configuration>
                    <source>1.8</source>
                    <target>1.8</target>
                    <annotationProcessorPaths>
                        <path>
                            <groupId>org.mapstruct</groupId>
                            <artifactId>mapstruct-processor</artifactId>
                            <version>${org.mapstruct.version}</version>
                        </path>
                        <path>
                            <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId>
                            <artifactId>lombok</artifactId>
                            <version>${org.projectlombok.version}</version>
                        </path>

                        <!-- additional annotation processor required as of Lombok 1.18.16 -->
                        <path>
                            <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId>
                            <artifactId>lombok-mapstruct-binding</artifactId>
                            <version>0.2.0</version>
                        </path>
                    </annotationProcessorPaths>

                    <compilerArgs>
                        <arg> -Amapstruct.suppressGeneratorTimestamp=true
                        </arg>
                        <arg> -Amapstruct.suppressGeneratorVersionInfoComment=true
                        </arg>
                        <arg> -Amapstruct.verbose=true
                        </arg>
                        <arg> -Amapstruct.defaultComponentModel=spring
                        </arg>
                        <arg> -Amapstruct.unmappedTargetPolicy=IGNORE
                        </arg>
                    </compilerArgs>
                </configuration>
            </plugin>
        </plugins>
    </build>
</project>

content.content:
1→# CLAUDE.md
     2→
     3→This file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository.
     4→
     5→## Project Overview
     6→
     7→SurveyKing (卷王) — AI-driven open-source survey and exam system. Supports 20+ question types, complex logic engine, AI-powered survey generation (via SiliconFlow API), and workflow (Flowable).
     8→
     9→## Architecture
    10→
    11→Monorepo with three main parts:
    12→
    13→### Server (`server/`) — Spring Boot 2.7.7 + Gradle 7.1 multi-module
    14→
    15→Base package: `cn.surveyking.server`
    16→
    17→| Module | Role | Key Dependencies |
    18→|--------|------|------------------|
    19→| **shared** | Core framework: security (JWT), exception handling, config, constants, DTOs, utils | Spring Security, Caffeine cache, fastexcel, jjwt |
    20→| **rdbms** | Data access and service implementations (MyBatis-Plus) | mybatis-plus-boot-starter 3.5.0, MySQL connector |
    21→| **api** | Main Spring Boot application, REST controllers (`*Api.java`), static resources | Depends on shared + rdbms + ai |
    22→| **flow** | Workflow engine integration | Flowable 6.7.0, depends on shared + rdbms |
    23→| **exam** | Exam module (placeholder, minimal code) | — |
    24→| **ai** | AI chat service for survey generation | SiliconFlow API integration |
    25→
    26→**Note:** The `ai` module exists in filesystem but is NOT listed in `settings.gradle`. The `api/build.gradle` references `project(':ai')` — you need to add `include 'ai'` to `settings.gradle` for a successful build.
    27→
    28→**Layered architecture:**
    29→- `api` module: Controllers (`*Api.java`) — thin REST layer
    30→- `shared` module: Service interfaces (`domain/dto/` for DTOs), core infrastructure
    31→- `rdbms` module: Service implementations (`impl/*ServiceImpl.java`), MyBatis mappers (`mapper/`), domain models (`domain/model/`)
    32→- Object mapping: MapStruct (configured via annotation processors in root build.gradle)
    33→
    34→### Client (`client/`) — Frontend (empty placeholder, no code yet)
    35→
    36→### Website (`website/`) — Docusaurus 2.0 documentation site
    37→
    38→## Build Commands
    39→
    40→All server commands run from `server/` directory:
    41→
    42→```bash
    43→# Build (development profile)
    44→./gradlew build -Pdev
    45→
    46→# Build (production profile)
    47→./gradlew build -Ppro
    48→
    49→# Run application
    50→./gradlew :api:bootRun
    51→
    52→# Run tests
    53→./gradlew test
    54→
    55→# Run single module tests
    56→./gradlew :rdbms:test
    57→./gradlew :shared:test
    58→
    59→# Code format check (Spring Java Format)
    60→./gradlew checkFormat
    61→
    62→# Apply code formatting
    63→./gradlew format
    64→```
    65→
    66→Website commands (from `website/`):
    67→```bash
    68→npm start          # dev server
    69→npm run build      # production build
    70→```
    71→
    72→## Configuration
    73→
    74→- Dev profile: `server/api/src/main/resources/application-dev.yml` + `server/rdbms/src/main/resources/config/application-dev.yml`
    75→- Prod profile: `server/api/src/main/resources/application-pro.yml` + `server/rdbms/src/main/resources/config/application-pro.yml`
    76→- Default port: 7007 (dev)
    77→- Default DB: MySQL (`localhost:3306/surveyking`), also supports H2 (commented out)
    78→- Gradle wrapper dist: Tencent cloud mirror (`mirrors.cloud.tencent.com`)
    79→- Default admin: `admin` / `123456`
    80→- AI config: set `AI_SILICONFLOW_TOKEN` env var or configure in `application.yml` under `surveyking.ai.siliconflow`
    81→
    82→## Key Conventions
    83→
    84→- Web server: Undertow (not Tomcat)
    85→- Code style: `io.spring.javaformat` plugin enforced — run `./gradlew format` before committing
    86→- Lombok + MapStruct used together (requires `lombok-mapstruct-binding`)
    87→- Logical delete: `deleted` field (MyBatis-Plus global config)
    88→- API prefix: `/api`
    89→- JSON: Jackson with `non_null` inclusion, `GMT+8` timezone
    90→- Security: JWT token auth + URL token auth (configurable)
    91→- Captcha: `anji-plus` sliding puzzle verification
    92→- Constants/enums in `shared/core/constant/` — check here before creating new ones
    93→- Exception handling: `GlobalExceptionHandler` in `shared/core/mvc/advice/`, custom exceptions in `shared/core/exception/`
    94→- Response wrapper: `ApiResponse` and `PaginationResponse` in `shared/core/common/`
    95→
    96→## Database
    97→
    98→- ORM: MyBatis-Plus 3.5.0
    99→- Init SQL: `scripts/database/survey.mv.db` (H2 format for quick start)
   100→- Production: MySQL 8.0 recommended
   101→- Docker: `server/api/Dockerfile` (OpenJDK 8 Alpine)
   102→

This file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository.

## Project Overview

SurveyKing (卷王) — AI-driven open-source survey and exam system. Supports 20+ question types, complex logic engine, AI-powered survey generation (via SiliconFlow API), and workflow (Flowable).

## Architecture

Monorepo with three main parts:

### Server (`server/`) — Spring Boot 2.7.7 + Gradle 7.1 multi-module

Base package: `cn.surveyking.server`

| Module | Role | Key Dependencies |
|--------|------|------------------|
| **shared** | Core framework: security (JWT), exception handling, config, constants, DTOs, utils | Spring Security, Caffeine cache, fastexcel, jjwt |
| **rdbms** | Data access and service implementations (MyBatis-Plus) | mybatis-plus-boot-starter 3.5.0, MySQL connector |
| **api** | Main Spring Boot application, REST controllers (`*Api.java`), static resources | Depends on shared + rdbms + ai |
| **flow** | Workflow engine integration | Flowable 6.7.0, depends on shared + rdbms |
| **exam** | Exam module (placeholder, minimal code) | — |
| **ai** | AI chat service for survey generation | SiliconFlow API integration |

**Note:** The `ai` module exists in filesystem but is NOT listed in `settings.gradle`. The `api/build.gradle` references `project(':ai')` — you need to add `include 'ai'` to `settings.gradle` for a successful build.

**Layered architecture:**
- `api` module: Controllers (`*Api.java`) — thin REST layer
- `shared` module: Service interfaces (`domain/dto/` for DTOs), core infrastructure
- `rdbms` module: Service implementations (`impl/*ServiceImpl.java`), MyBatis mappers (`mapper/`), domain models (`domain/model/`)
- Object mapping: MapStruct (configured via annotation processors in root build.gradle)

### Client (`client/`) — Frontend (empty placeholder, no code yet)

### Website (`website/`) — Docusaurus 2.0 documentation site

## Build Commands

All server commands run from `server/` directory:

```bash
# Build (development profile)
./gradlew build -Pdev

# Build (production profile)
./gradlew build -Ppro

# Run application
./gradlew :api:bootRun

# Run tests
./gradlew test

# Run single module tests
./gradlew :rdbms:test
./gradlew :shared:test

# Code format check (Spring Java Format)
./gradlew checkFormat

# Apply code formatting
./gradlew format
```

Website commands (from `website/`):
```bash
npm start          # dev server
npm run build      # production build
```

## Configuration

- Dev profile: `server/api/src/main/resources/application-dev.yml` + `server/rdbms/src/main/resources/config/application-dev.yml`
- Prod profile: `server/api/src/main/resources/application-pro.yml` + `server/rdbms/src/main/resources/config/application-pro.yml`
- Default port: 7007 (dev)
- Default DB: MySQL (`localhost:3306/surveyking`), also supports H2 (commented out)
- Gradle wrapper dist: Tencent cloud mirror (`mirrors.cloud.tencent.com`)
- Default admin: `admin` / `123456`
- AI config: set `AI_SILICONFLOW_TOKEN` env var or configure in `application.yml` under `surveyking.ai.siliconflow`

## Key Conventions

- Web server: Undertow (not Tomcat)
- Code style: `io.spring.javaformat` plugin enforced — run `./gradlew format` before committing
- Lombok + MapStruct used together (requires `lombok-mapstruct-binding`)
- Logical delete: `deleted` field (MyBatis-Plus global config)
- API prefix: `/api`
- JSON: Jackson with `non_null` inclusion, `GMT+8` timezone
- Security: JWT token auth + URL token auth (configurable)
- Captcha: `anji-plus` sliding puzzle verification
- Constants/enums in `shared/core/constant/` — check here before creating new ones
- Exception handling: `GlobalExceptionHandler` in `shared/core/mvc/advice/`, custom exceptions in `shared/core/exception/`
- Response wrapper: `ApiResponse` and `PaginationResponse` in `shared/core/common/`

## Database

- ORM: MyBatis-Plus 3.5.0
- Init SQL: `scripts/database/survey.mv.db` (H2 format for quick start)
- Production: MySQL 8.0 recommended
- Docker: `server/api/Dockerfile` (OpenJDK 8 Alpine)

果然，**JDK 21**，项目要求 **Java 8**。

爹，情况是这样的：项目 pom.xml 写的 `source/target=1.8`，Lombok 版本太老，跟 JDK 21 完全不兼容。两条路：

| 方案 | 改动 | 风险 |
|------|------|------|
| **A. 改 pom.xml 升级 Lombok** | `1.16.18` → `1.18.30`，`1.18.16` → `1.18.30` | 极低，Lombok 完全向下兼容 |
| **B. 装 JDK 8** | 不改项目，本地装 JDK 8 用来编译 | 零风险，但要额外装 JDK |

input.content:
# CLAUDE.md

This file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository.

## 项目概述

SurveyKing（卷王）— AI 驱动的开源问卷调查与考试系统。支持 20+ 题型、复杂逻辑引擎、AI 智能出卷（SiliconFlow API）、工作流（Flowable）。

## 架构

Monorepo，三个主要部分：

### 服务端 (`server/`) — Spring Boot 2.7.7，支持 Gradle 7.1 和 Maven 双构建

基础包名：`cn.surveyking.server`

| 模块 | 职责 | 关键依赖 |
|------|------|----------|
| **shared** | 核心框架：安全（JWT）、异常处理、配置、常量、DTO、工具类 | Spring Security, Caffeine, fastexcel, jjwt |
| **rdbms** | 数据访问和 Service 实现（MyBatis-Plus） | mybatis-plus-boot-starter 3.5.0, MySQL |
| **api** | Spring Boot 主应用，REST 控制器（`*Api.java`），静态资源 | 依赖 shared + rdbms + ai |
| **flow** | 工作流引擎集成（仅 Gradle 构建包含，Maven 中已注释） | Flowable 6.7.0 |
| **exam** | 考试模块（占位，代码极少） | — |
| **ai** | AI 对话服务，用于智能生成问卷 | SiliconFlow API |

**注意事项：**
- Gradle 构建：`ai` 模块存在但未在 `settings.gradle` 中 include，需手动添加 `include 'ai'`
- Maven 构建：`pom.xml` 已包含 ai 模块，但 flow 模块被注释掉
- 项目目标 Java 版本为 1.8，当前 Lombok 版本（1.16.18/1.18.16）不兼容 JDK 17+，编译需使用 JDK 8

**分层架构：**
- `api` 模块：Controller 层（`*Api.java`）— 薄 REST 层
- `shared` 模块：Service 接口、DTO（`domain/dto/`）、核心基础设施
- `rdbms` 模块：Service 实现（`impl/*ServiceImpl.java`）、MyBatis Mapper（`mapper/`）、数据模型（`domain/model/`）
- 对象映射：MapStruct（通过 annotationProcessorPaths 配置）

### 前端 (`client/`) — 占位目录，暂无代码

### 文档站 (`website/`) — Docusaurus 2.0

## 构建命令

### Gradle（从 `server/` 目录执行）

```bash
./gradlew build -Pdev          # 开发环境构建
./gradlew build -Ppro          # 生产环境构建
./gradlew :api:bootRun         # 启动应用
./gradlew test                 # 运行测试
./gradlew :rdbms:test          # 单模块测试
./gradlew checkFormat          # 代码格式检查（Spring Java Format）
./gradlew format               # 应用代码格式化
```

### Maven（从 `server/` 目录执行，需 JDK 8）

```bash
mvn clean package -DskipTests  # 构建（跳过测试）
mvn clean package              # 构建（含测试）
```

### 文档站（从 `website/` 目录执行）

```bash
npm start                      # 开发服务器
npm run build                  # 生产构建
```

## 配置

- 开发配置：`server/api/src/main/resources/application-dev.yml` + `server/rdbms/src/main/resources/config/application-dev.yml`
- 生产配置：`server/api/src/main/resources/application-pro.yml` + `server/rdbms/src/main/resources/config/application-pro.yml`
- 默认端口：7007（开发环境）
- 默认数据库：MySQL（`localhost:3306/surveyking`），也支持 H2
- Gradle 下载镜像：腾讯云（`mirrors.cloud.tencent.com`）
- 默认管理员：`admin` / `123456`
- AI 配置：设置环境变量 `AI_SILICONFLOW_TOKEN` 或在 `application.yml` 中配置 `surveyking.ai.siliconflow`

## 关键约定

- Web 容器：Undertow（非 Tomcat）
- 代码风格：`io.spring.javaformat` 插件强制检查，提交前执行 `./gradlew format`
- Lombok + MapStruct 联合使用（需 `lombok-mapstruct-binding`）
- 逻辑删除：`deleted` 字段（MyBatis-Plus 全局配置）
- API 前缀：`/api`
- JSON：Jackson，`non_null` 序列化，`GMT+8` 时区
- 安全：JWT Token 认证 + URL Token 认证（可配置）
- 验证码：`anji-plus` 滑动拼图验证
- 常量/枚举：`shared/core/constant/` — 新建前先检查此目录
- 异常处理：`GlobalExceptionHandler` 在 `shared/core/mvc/advice/`，自定义异常在 `shared/core/exception/`
- 响应包装：`ApiResponse` 和 `PaginationResponse` 在 `shared/core/common/`

## 数据库

- ORM：MyBatis-Plus 3.5.0
- 初始化 SQL：`scripts/database/survey.mv.db`（H2 格式，快速启动用）
- 生产环境：推荐 MySQL 8.0
- Docker：`server/api/Dockerfile`（OpenJDK 8 Alpine）

# CLAUDE.md

This file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository.

## Project Overview

SurveyKing (卷王) — AI-driven open-source survey and exam system. Supports 20+ question types, complex logic engine, AI-powered survey generation (via SiliconFlow API), and workflow (Flowable).

## Architecture

Monorepo with three main parts:

### Server (`server/`) — Spring Boot 2.7.7 + Gradle 7.1 multi-module

Base package: `cn.surveyking.server`

| Module | Role | Key Dependencies |
|--------|------|------------------|
| **shared** | Core framework: security (JWT), exception handling, config, constants, DTOs, utils | Spring Security, Caffeine cache, fastexcel, jjwt |
| **rdbms** | Data access and service implementations (MyBatis-Plus) | mybatis-plus-boot-starter 3.5.0, MySQL connector |
| **api** | Main Spring Boot application, REST controllers (`*Api.java`), static resources | Depends on shared + rdbms + ai |
| **flow** | Workflow engine integration | Flowable 6.7.0, depends on shared + rdbms |
| **exam** | Exam module (placeholder, minimal code) | — |
| **ai** | AI chat service for survey generation | SiliconFlow API integration |

**Note:** The `ai` module exists in filesystem but is NOT listed in `settings.gradle`. The `api/build.gradle` references `project(':ai')` — you need to add `include 'ai'` to `settings.gradle` for a successful build.

**Layered architecture:**
- `api` module: Controllers (`*Api.java`) — thin REST layer
- `shared` module: Service interfaces (`domain/dto/` for DTOs), core infrastructure
- `rdbms` module: Service implementations (`impl/*ServiceImpl.java`), MyBatis mappers (`mapper/`), domain models (`domain/model/`)
- Object mapping: MapStruct (configured via annotation processors in root build.gradle)

### Client (`client/`) — Frontend (empty placeholder, no code yet)

### Website (`website/`) — Docusaurus 2.0 documentation site

## Build Commands

All server commands run from `server/` directory:

```bash
# Build (development profile)
./gradlew build -Pdev

# Build (production profile)
./gradlew build -Ppro

# Run application
./gradlew :api:bootRun

# Run tests
./gradlew test

# Run single module tests
./gradlew :rdbms:test
./gradlew :shared:test

# Code format check (Spring Java Format)
./gradlew checkFormat

# Apply code formatting
./gradlew format
```

Website commands (from `website/`):
```bash
npm start          # dev server
npm run build      # production build
```

## Configuration

- Dev profile: `server/api/src/main/resources/application-dev.yml` + `server/rdbms/src/main/resources/config/application-dev.yml`
- Prod profile: `server/api/src/main/resources/application-pro.yml` + `server/rdbms/src/main/resources/config/application-pro.yml`
- Default port: 7007 (dev)
- Default DB: MySQL (`localhost:3306/surveyking`), also supports H2 (commented out)
- Gradle wrapper dist: Tencent cloud mirror (`mirrors.cloud.tencent.com`)
- Default admin: `admin` / `123456`
- AI config: set `AI_SILICONFLOW_TOKEN` env var or configure in `application.yml` under `surveyking.ai.siliconflow`

## Key Conventions

- Web server: Undertow (not Tomcat)
- Code style: `io.spring.javaformat` plugin enforced — run `./gradlew format` before committing
- Lombok + MapStruct used together (requires `lombok-mapstruct-binding`)
- Logical delete: `deleted` field (MyBatis-Plus global config)
- API prefix: `/api`
- JSON: Jackson with `non_null` inclusion, `GMT+8` timezone
- Security: JWT token auth + URL token auth (configurable)
- Captcha: `anji-plus` sliding puzzle verification
- Constants/enums in `shared/core/constant/` — check here before creating new ones
- Exception handling: `GlobalExceptionHandler` in `shared/core/mvc/advice/`, custom exceptions in `shared/core/exception/`
- Response wrapper: `ApiResponse` and `PaginationResponse` in `shared/core/common/`

## Database

- ORM: MyBatis-Plus 3.5.0
- Init SQL: `scripts/database/survey.mv.db` (H2 format for quick start)
- Production: MySQL 8.0 recommended
- Docker: `server/api/Dockerfile` (OpenJDK 8 Alpine)

file.content:
Docker Compose 部署
⚡ 一键启动（推荐）
curl -sSO https://surveyking.cn/surveyking-docker/setup.sh  && bash setup.sh

服务管理
启动服务
cd surveyking
docker compose up -d

停止服务
docker compose down

重启服务
# 重启所有服务
docker compose restart

# 重启特定服务
docker compose restart surveyking-app
docker compose restart surveyking-mysql

查看服务状态
docker compose ps

日志和监控
查看日志
# 查看所有服务日志
docker compose logs

# 查看特定服务日志
docker compose logs surveyking-app
docker compose logs surveyking-mysql

# 实时查看日志
docker compose logs -f surveyking-app

错误日志位置
应用日志：docker compose logs surveyking-app
数据库日志：docker compose logs surveyking-mysql
容器内应用日志：/app/logs/ 目录
数据库管理
查看 MySQL 密码
# 查看生成的密码（格式：MYSQL_PASSWORD=随机密码）
cat ./surveyking/.env | grep MYSQL_PASSWORD

连接数据库
# 进入 MySQL 容器
docker compose exec surveyking-mysql mysql -u surveyking -p

# 从外部连接数据库
mysql -h 127.0.0.1 -P 3306 -u surveyking -p surveyking

数据库信息
数据库名：surveyking
用户名：surveyking
端口：3306（可通过 SK_MYSQL_PORT 自定义）
密码：查看 surveyking/.env 文件中的 MYSQL_PASSWORD
更新应用
# 拉取最新镜像
docker compose pull

# 重启服务
docker compose up -d

# 清理旧镜像（可选）
docker image prune -f

故障排除
检查服务状态
# 查看容器状态
docker compose ps

# 查看资源使用情况
docker stats

常见问题
端口被占用

# 查看端口占用
lsof -i :1991
# 解决方案：指定其他端口
SK_APP_PORT=8080 bash setup.sh

服务启动失败

# 查看详细错误日志
docker compose logs surveyking-app

# 重启服务
docker compose restart surveyking-app

数据库连接失败

# 查看数据库日志
docker compose logs surveyking-mysql

# 检查数据库状态
docker compose exec surveyking-mysql mysql -u surveyking -p -e "SELECT 1"

重置服务
# 完全重置（会删除数据）
docker compose down -v
docker compose up -d

访问系统
前端页面：http://localhost:1991
管理后台：http://localhost:1991/admin
默认账号：admin / 123456
注意
部署完成后请立即修改默认密码！

数据备份
# 进入 surveyking 目录
cd surveyking

# 获取密码
MYSQL_PASSWORD=$(grep MYSQL_PASSWORD .env | cut -d'=' -f2)

# 备份数据库到当前目录
docker compose exec surveyking-mysql mysqldump -u surveyking -p${MYSQL_PASSWORD} surveyking > backup_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).sql

# 恢复数据库
docker compose exec -i surveyking-mysql mysql -u surveyking -p${MYSQL_PASSWORD} surveyking < backup_20241201_120000.sql

手动备份（需要输入密码）
cd surveyking

# 备份数据库（会提示输入密码）
docker compose exec surveyking-mysql mysqldump -u surveyking -p surveyking > backup.sql

# 恢复数据库（会提示输入密码）
docker compose exec -i surveyking-mysql mysql -u surveyking -p surveyking < backup.sql

content.content:
1→#!/usr/bin/env bash
     2→set -euo pipefail
     3→
     4→########## 可配置项（环境变量可覆盖） ##########
     5→SK_APP_PORT="${SK_APP_PORT:-1991}"
     6→SK_MYSQL_PORT="${SK_MYSQL_PORT:-3306}"
     7→SK_SKIP_3306_CHECK="${SK_SKIP_3306_CHECK:-0}"
     8→SK_SQL_URL="${SK_SQL_URL:-https://surveyking.cn/surveyking-docker/sqls/init-mysql.sql}"
     9→WORKDIR="./surveyking"
    10→
    11→########## 平台检测（用于 netstat 选项差异） ##########
    12→OS_NAME="$(uname -s 2>/dev/null || echo unknown)"
    13→IS_DARWIN=0; [ "$OS_NAME" = "Darwin" ] && IS_DARWIN=1
    14→
    15→########## 彩色日志 ##########
    16→detect_color_support() {
    17→  if [ -t 1 ] && [ "${TERM:-}" != "dumb" ] && command -v tput >/dev/null 2>&1 && tput colors >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    18→    RED='\033[0;31m'; GREEN='\033[0;32m'; YELLOW='\033[1;33m'; NC='\033[0m'
    19→  else
    20→    RED=''; GREEN=''; YELLOW=''; NC=''
    21→  fi
    22→}
    23→detect_color_support
    24→log_info()  { echo -e "${GREEN}[INFO]${NC} $*"; }
    25→log_warn()  { echo -e "${YELLOW}[WARN]${NC} $*"; }
    26→log_error() { echo -e "${RED}[ERROR]${NC} $*"; }
    27→
    28→########## docker compose 兼容 ##########
    29→ensure_docker() {
    30→  command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1 || { log_error "未检测到 Docker，请先安装"; exit 1; }
    31→  if docker compose version >/div/null 2>&1; then
    32→    DC="docker compose"
    33→  elif command -v docker-compose >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    34→    DC="docker-compose"
    35→  else
    36→    log_error "未检测到 docker compose（既没有 'docker compose' 也没有 'docker-compose'）"
    37→    exit 1
    38→  fi
    39→}
    40→
    41→########## 端口检测（跨平台更稳健） ##########
    42→check_port() {
    43→  # 0=未占用；1=已占用
    44→  local port="$1"
    45→
    46→  if command -v lsof >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    47→    if lsof -nP -iTCP:"$port" -sTCP:LISTEN -t >/dev/null 2>&1; then return 1; fi
    48→  fi
    49→
    50→  if command -v ss >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    51→    if ss -ltnu 2>/dev/null | grep -E "[:.]${port}([[:space:]]|$)" >/dev/null 2>&1; then return 1; fi
    52→  fi
    53→
    54→  if command -v netstat >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    55→    if [ $IS_DARWIN -eq 1 ]; then
    56→      # macOS: -p 需要协议名
    57→      if netstat -anp tcp 2>/dev/null | grep -E "[\.:]${port}([[:space:]]|$)" | grep LISTEN >/dev/null 2>&1; then return 1; fi
    58→    else
    59→      if netstat -an 2>/dev/null | grep -E "[\.:]${port}([[:space:]]|$)" | grep -E "LISTEN|udp" >/dev/null 2>&1; then return 1; fi
    60→    fi
    61→  fi
    62→
    63→  if command -v nc >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    64→    if nc -z 127.0.0.1 "$port" >/dev/null 2>&1; then return 1; fi
    65→  fi
    66→
    67→  return 0
    68→}
    69→
    70→show_port_owners() {
    71→  # 打印占用该端口的进程详情 + 排查建议
    72→  local port="$1"
    73→  echo
    74→  echo "占用详情（端口 $port）："
    75→  if command -v lsof >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    76→    lsof -nP -iTCP:"$port" -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null || true
    77→  elif command -v ss >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    78→    ss -ltnup 2>/dev/null | grep -E "[:.]${port}([[:space:]]|$)" || true
    79→  elif command -v netstat >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    80→    if [ $IS_DARWIN -eq 1 ]; then
    81→      netstat -anp tcp 2>/dev/null | grep -E "[\.:]${port}([[:space:]]|$)" | grep LISTEN || true
    82→    else
    83→      netstat -anp 2>/dev/null | grep -E "[\.:]${port}([[:space:]]|$)" | grep -E "LISTEN|udp" || true
    84→    fi
    85→  else
    86→    echo "（提示：未找到 lsof/ss/netstat，无法显示占用明细）"
    87→  fi
    88→
    89→  echo
    90→  echo "排查建议："
    91→  if command -v lsof >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    92→    echo "  查看占用：lsof -nP -iTCP:$port -sTCP:LISTEN"
    93→    echo "  结束进程（示例）：kill -9 \$(lsof -t -iTCP:$port -sTCP:LISTEN)"
    94→  elif command -v ss >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    95→    echo "  查看占用：ss -ltnup | grep -E '[:.]$port([[:space:]]|$)'"
    96→  elif command -v netstat >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    97→    if [ $IS_DARWIN -eq 1 ]; then
    98→      echo "  查看占用：netstat -anp tcp | grep -E '[\\.:]$port([[:space:]]|$)' | grep LISTEN"
    99→    else
   100→      echo "  查看占用：netstat -anp | grep -E '[\\.:]$port([[:space:]]|$)' | grep LISTEN"
   101→    fi
   102→  fi
   103→  echo
   104→}
   105→
   106→find_free_port() {
   107→  # 从给定起点开始，找下一个未占用端口
   108→  local p="$1"
   109→  local limit="${2:-30}"
   110→  local i=0
   111→  while [ $i -lt $limit ]; do
   112→    if check_port "$p"; then
   113→      echo "$p"; return 0
   114→    fi
   115→    p=$((p+1))
   116→    i=$((i+1))
   117→  done
   118→  echo ""
   119→  return 1
   120→}
   121→
   122→########## 随机密码 ##########
   123→generate_password() {
   124→  if command -v openssl >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   125→    openssl rand -base64 32 | tr -dc 'A-Za-z0-9' | head -c16
   126→  elif [ -r /dev/urandom ]; then
   127→    tr -dc 'A-Za-z0-9' </dev/urandom | head -c16
   128→  else
   129→    printf "sk%s" "$(date +%s)" | md5sum 2>/dev/null | cut -c1-16 || date +%s | cut -c1-16
   130→  fi
   131→}
   132→
   133→########## 下载器 ##########
   134→ensure_downloader() {
   135→  if command -v curl >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   136→    DL_GET="curl -fL --connect-timeout 10 --retry 2 -o"
   137→  elif command -v wget >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   138→    DL_GET="wget -O"
   139→  else
   140→    log_error "需要 curl 或 wget 之一用于下载 init SQL"
   141→    exit 1
   142→  fi
   143→}
   144→
   145→########## 交互式端口选择 ##########
   146→is_valid_port() { [[ "$1" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]] && [ "$1" -ge 1 ] && [ "$1" -le 65535 ]; }
   147→
   148→prompt_for_port() {
   149→  # $1=默认值 $2=提示 $3=是否检查占用(1/0)
   150→  local default_val="$1" prompt_desc="$2" do_check="$3"
   151→  local input=""
   152→  while true; do
   153→    read -rp "$prompt_desc [$default_val]（回车=默认，!=强制使用）: " input || true
   154→    input="${input:-$default_val}"
   155→
   156→    if [ "$input" = "!" ]; then
   157→      printf '%s' "$default_val"; return 0
   158→    fi
   159→    if ! is_valid_port "$input"; then
   160→      log_warn "端口无效：$input，请输入 1-65535 的整数。"; continue
   161→    fi
   162→    if [ "$do_check" = "1" ] && ! check_port "$input"; then
   163→      log_warn "端口 $input 已被占用。"
   164→      show_port_owners "$input"
   165→      local suggestion; suggestion="$(find_free_port "$((input+1))" 30)"
   166→      if [ -n "$suggestion" ]; then
   167→        read -rp "是否使用建议端口 $suggestion ? [Y/n/!强制用$input] " yn || true
   168→        case "${yn:-Y}" in
   169→          Y|y|"") printf '%s' "$suggestion"; return 0 ;;
   170→          "!")    printf '%s' "$input"; return 0 ;;
   171→          *)      continue ;;
   172→        esac
   173→      else
   174→        log_warn "附近未找到可用端口。可输入新端口，或输入 ! 强制使用（可能导致启动失败）。"
   175→      fi
   176→      continue
   177→    fi
   178→    printf '%s' "$input"; return 0
   179→  done
   180→}
   181→
   182→maybe_prompt_ports() {
   183→  if [ -t 0 ]; then
   184→    log_info "端口设置（直接回车使用默认值；输入 ! 强制使用默认端口）"
   185→    SK_APP_PORT="$(prompt_for_port "$SK_APP_PORT" "选择应用端口（对外暴露）" "1")"
   186→    local do_check="1"
   187→    if [ "${SK_SKIP_3306_CHECK}" = "1" ]; then
   188→      do_check="0"; log_warn "已配置 SK_SKIP_3306_CHECK=1，将不检测 MySQL 端口占用。"
   189→    fi
   190→    SK_MYSQL_PORT="$(prompt_for_port "$SK_MYSQL_PORT" "选择 MySQL 端口（对外暴露）" "$do_check")"
   191→  else
   192→    log_warn "非交互环境，使用默认/环境变量端口：APP=$SK_APP_PORT, MYSQL=$SK_MYSQL_PORT"
   193→    if ! check_port "$SK_APP_PORT"; then
   194→      log_error "APP 端口 $SK_APP_PORT 已占用（非交互模式无法更改），请设置 SK_APP_PORT 后重试。"; exit 1
   195→    fi
   196→    if [ "$SK_SKIP_3306_CHECK" != "1" ] && ! check_port "$SK_MYSQL_PORT"; then
   197→      log_error "MySQL 端口 $SK_MYSQL_PORT 已占用（非交互模式无法更改），请设置 SK_MYSQL_PORT 或 SK_SKIP_3306_CHECK=1 后重试。"; exit 1
   198→    fi
   199→  fi
   200→}
   201→
   202→########## 主流程 ##########
   203→main() {
   204→  ensure_docker
   205→  ensure_downloader
   206→
   207→  # 交互式端口选择（或非交互使用默认/环境变量）

file.content:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

########## 可配置项（环境变量可覆盖） ##########
SK_APP_PORT="${SK_APP_PORT:-1991}"
SK_MYSQL_PORT="${SK_MYSQL_PORT:-3306}"
SK_SKIP_3306_CHECK="${SK_SKIP_3306_CHECK:-0}"
SK_SQL_URL="${SK_SQL_URL:-https://surveyking.cn/surveyking-docker/sqls/init-mysql.sql}"
WORKDIR="./surveyking"

########## 平台检测（用于 netstat 选项差异） ##########
OS_NAME="$(uname -s 2>/dev/null || echo unknown)"
IS_DARWIN=0; [ "$OS_NAME" = "Darwin" ] && IS_DARWIN=1

########## 彩色日志 ##########
detect_color_support() {
  if [ -t 1 ] && [ "${TERM:-}" != "dumb" ] && command -v tput >/dev/null 2>&1 && tput colors >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    RED='\033[0;31m'; GREEN='\033[0;32m'; YELLOW='\033[1;33m'; NC='\033[0m'
  else
    RED=''; GREEN=''; YELLOW=''; NC=''
  fi
}
detect_color_support
log_info()  { echo -e "${GREEN}[INFO]${NC} $*"; }
log_warn()  { echo -e "${YELLOW}[WARN]${NC} $*"; }
log_error() { echo -e "${RED}[ERROR]${NC} $*"; }

########## docker compose 兼容 ##########
ensure_docker() {
  command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1 || { log_error "未检测到 Docker，请先安装"; exit 1; }
  if docker compose version >/div/null 2>&1; then
    DC="docker compose"
  elif command -v docker-compose >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    DC="docker-compose"
  else
    log_error "未检测到 docker compose（既没有 'docker compose' 也没有 'docker-compose'）"
    exit 1
  fi
}

########## 端口检测（跨平台更稳健） ##########
check_port() {
  # 0=未占用；1=已占用
  local port="$1"

  if command -v lsof >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    if lsof -nP -iTCP:"$port" -sTCP:LISTEN -t >/dev/null 2>&1; then return 1; fi
  fi

  if command -v ss >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    if ss -ltnu 2>/dev/null | grep -E "[:.]${port}([[:space:]]|$)" >/dev/null 2>&1; then return 1; fi
  fi

  if command -v netstat >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    if [ $IS_DARWIN -eq 1 ]; then
      # macOS: -p 需要协议名
      if netstat -anp tcp 2>/dev/null | grep -E "[\.:]${port}([[:space:]]|$)" | grep LISTEN >/dev/null 2>&1; then return 1; fi
    else
      if netstat -an 2>/dev/null | grep -E "[\.:]${port}([[:space:]]|$)" | grep -E "LISTEN|udp" >/dev/null 2>&1; then return 1; fi
    fi
  fi

  if command -v nc >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    if nc -z 127.0.0.1 "$port" >/dev/null 2>&1; then return 1; fi
  fi

  return 0
}

show_port_owners() {
  # 打印占用该端口的进程详情 + 排查建议
  local port="$1"
  echo
  echo "占用详情（端口 $port）："
  if command -v lsof >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    lsof -nP -iTCP:"$port" -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null || true
  elif command -v ss >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    ss -ltnup 2>/dev/null | grep -E "[:.]${port}([[:space:]]|$)" || true
  elif command -v netstat >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    if [ $IS_DARWIN -eq 1 ]; then
      netstat -anp tcp 2>/dev/null | grep -E "[\.:]${port}([[:space:]]|$)" | grep LISTEN || true
    else
      netstat -anp 2>/dev/null | grep -E "[\.:]${port}([[:space:]]|$)" | grep -E "LISTEN|udp" || true
    fi
  else
    echo "（提示：未找到 lsof/ss/netstat，无法显示占用明细）"
  fi

  echo
  echo "排查建议："
  if command -v lsof >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "  查看占用：lsof -nP -iTCP:$port -sTCP:LISTEN"
    echo "  结束进程（示例）：kill -9 \$(lsof -t -iTCP:$port -sTCP:LISTEN)"
  elif command -v ss >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "  查看占用：ss -ltnup | grep -E '[:.]$port([[:space:]]|$)'"
  elif command -v netstat >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    if [ $IS_DARWIN -eq 1 ]; then
      echo "  查看占用：netstat -anp tcp | grep -E '[\\.:]$port([[:space:]]|$)' | grep LISTEN"
    else
      echo "  查看占用：netstat -anp | grep -E '[\\.:]$port([[:space:]]|$)' | grep LISTEN"
    fi
  fi
  echo
}

find_free_port() {
  # 从给定起点开始，找下一个未占用端口
  local p="$1"
  local limit="${2:-30}"
  local i=0
  while [ $i -lt $limit ]; do
    if check_port "$p"; then
      echo "$p"; return 0
    fi
    p=$((p+1))
    i=$((i+1))
  done
  echo ""
  return 1
}

########## 随机密码 ##########
generate_password() {
  if command -v openssl >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    openssl rand -base64 32 | tr -dc 'A-Za-z0-9' | head -c16
  elif [ -r /dev/urandom ]; then
    tr -dc 'A-Za-z0-9' </dev/urandom | head -c16
  else
    printf "sk%s" "$(date +%s)" | md5sum 2>/dev/null | cut -c1-16 || date +%s | cut -c1-16
  fi
}

########## 下载器 ##########
ensure_downloader() {
  if command -v curl >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    DL_GET="curl -fL --connect-timeout 10 --retry 2 -o"
  elif command -v wget >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    DL_GET="wget -O"
  else
    log_error "需要 curl 或 wget 之一用于下载 init SQL"
    exit 1
  fi
}

########## 交互式端口选择 ##########
is_valid_port() { [[ "$1" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]] && [ "$1" -ge 1 ] && [ "$1" -le 65535 ]; }

prompt_for_port() {
  # $1=默认值 $2=提示 $3=是否检查占用(1/0)
  local default_val="$1" prompt_desc="$2" do_check="$3"
  local input=""
  while true; do
    read -rp "$prompt_desc [$default_val]（回车=默认，!=强制使用）: " input || true
    input="${input:-$default_val}"

    if [ "$input" = "!" ]; then
      printf '%s' "$default_val"; return 0
    fi
    if ! is_valid_port "$input"; then
      log_warn "端口无效：$input，请输入 1-65535 的整数。"; continue
    fi
    if [ "$do_check" = "1" ] && ! check_port "$input"; then
      log_warn "端口 $input 已被占用。"
      show_port_owners "$input"
      local suggestion; suggestion="$(find_free_port "$((input+1))" 30)"
      if [ -n "$suggestion" ]; then
        read -rp "是否使用建议端口 $suggestion ? [Y/n/!强制用$input] " yn || true
        case "${yn:-Y}" in
          Y|y|"") printf '%s' "$suggestion"; return 0 ;;
          "!")    printf '%s' "$input"; return 0 ;;
          *)      continue ;;
        esac
      else
        log_warn "附近未找到可用端口。可输入新端口，或输入 ! 强制使用（可能导致启动失败）。"
      fi
      continue
    fi
    printf '%s' "$input"; return 0
  done
}

maybe_prompt_ports() {
  if [ -t 0 ]; then
    log_info "端口设置（直接回车使用默认值；输入 ! 强制使用默认端口）"
    SK_APP_PORT="$(prompt_for_port "$SK_APP_PORT" "选择应用端口（对外暴露）" "1")"
    local do_check="1"
    if [ "${SK_SKIP_3306_CHECK}" = "1" ]; then
      do_check="0"; log_warn "已配置 SK_SKIP_3306_CHECK=1，将不检测 MySQL 端口占用。"
    fi
    SK_MYSQL_PORT="$(prompt_for_port "$SK_MYSQL_PORT" "选择 MySQL 端口（对外暴露）" "$do_check")"
  else
    log_warn "非交互环境，使用默认/环境变量端口：APP=$SK_APP_PORT, MYSQL=$SK_MYSQL_PORT"
    if ! check_port "$SK_APP_PORT"; then
      log_error "APP 端口 $SK_APP_PORT 已占用（非交互模式无法更改），请设置 SK_APP_PORT 后重试。"; exit 1
    fi
    if [ "$SK_SKIP_3306_CHECK" != "1" ] && ! check_port "$SK_MYSQL_PORT"; then
      log_error "MySQL 端口 $SK_MYSQL_PORT 已占用（非交互模式无法更改），请设置 SK_MYSQL_PORT 或 SK_SKIP_3306_CHECK=1 后重试。"; exit 1
    fi
  fi
}

########## 主流程 ##########
main() {
  ensure_docker
  ensure_downloader

  # 交互式端口选择（或非交互使用默认/环境变量）
  maybe_prompt_ports

  log_info "创建目录..."
  mkdir -p "$WORKDIR"/{mysql/conf,mysql/data,sqls,files,logs}
  chmod 755 "$WORKDIR" || true
  chmod 777 "$WORKDIR"/{mysql/data,files,logs} 2>/dev/null || true

  cd "$WORKDIR"

  # .env（若已存在则保留）
  if [ ! -f .env ]; then
    local pass="${MYSQL_PASSWORD:-$(generate_password)}"
    echo "MYSQL_PASSWORD=$pass" > .env
    log_warn "MySQL 密码：$pass  （已写入 $(pwd)/.env）"
  else
    log_info ".env 已存在，保持原有 MYSQL_PASSWORD"
  fi

  # 在线下载 init SQL（必须）
  log_info "下载初始化 SQL：$SK_SQL_URL"
  if ! bash -c "$DL_GET sqls/init-mysql.sql '$SK_SQL_URL'"; then
    log_error "下载 init-mysql.sql 失败，请检查网络或设置 SK_SQL_URL"; exit 1
  fi

  # 写入本地 compose（不在线下载）
  log_info "写入 docker-compose.yml ..."
  cat > docker-compose.yml <<YAML
services:
  mysql:
    image: mysql:8.0
    container_name: surveyking-mysql
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: \${MYSQL_PASSWORD:-surveyking}
      MYSQL_DATABASE: surveyking
      MYSQL_USER: surveyking
      MYSQL_PASSWORD: \${MYSQL_PASSWORD:-surveyking}
    volumes:
      - ./mysql/data:/var/lib/mysql
      - ./mysql/conf:/etc/mysql/conf.d:ro
      - ./sqls:/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d:ro
    ports:
      - "${SK_MYSQL_PORT}:3306"   # 左=宿主机端口（你选择的）；右=容器内端口（固定 3306）
    networks:
      - surveyking_network
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "mysqladmin", "ping", "-h", "localhost"]
      timeout: 20s
      retries: 10
      start_period: 40s
      interval: 30s
    command: >
      --character-set-server=utf8mb4
      --collation-server=utf8mb4_unicode_ci
      --default-time-zone=+08:00
      --log-bin-trust-function-creators=1

  surveyking:
    image: surveyking/surveyking:latest
    container_name: surveyking-app
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      PROFILE: mysql
      MYSQL_USER: surveyking
      MYSQL_PASS: \${MYSQL_PASSWORD:-surveyking}
      # 注意：这里使用容器内地址 mysql:3306，不随宿主机端口变化
      DB_URL: jdbc:mysql://mysql:3306/surveyking?useSSL=false&allowPublicKeyRetrieval=true&serverTimezone=Asia/Shanghai&useUnicode=true
      TZ: Asia/Shanghai
      JAVA_OPTS: "-Xms512m -Xmx1g -Dfile.encoding=UTF-8"
      JAVA_TOOL_OPTIONS: "-Xms512m -Xmx1g -Dfile.encoding=UTF-8"
    volumes:
      - ./files:/app/files
      - ./logs:/app/logs
    depends_on:
      mysql:
        condition: service_healthy
    ports:
      - "${SK_APP_PORT}:1991"
    networks:
      - surveyking_network
    healthcheck:
      # CMD-SHELL 才能解析 ||
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "curl -fsS http://localhost:1991/health || curl -fsS http://localhost:1991/actuator/health || wget -qO- http://localhost:1991/health || exit 1"]
      timeout: 30s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 60s
      interval: 30s

networks:
  surveyking_network:
    driver: bridge
YAML

  log_info "启动容器..."
  if ! ${DC} up -d; then
    log_error "启动失败，请先查看日志：docker logs -f surveyking-mysql | docker logs -f surveyking-app"
    exit 1
  fi

  log_info "部署完成 ✅"
  echo
  log_info "📌 访问信息："
  log_info "访问地址: http://localhost:${SK_APP_PORT}"
  log_info "默认账号: admin"
  log_info "默认密码: 123456"
  echo
  log_warn "🔐 安全提醒：请登录后立即修改默认密码！"
  echo
  log_info "📊 数据库信息："
  log_info "MySQL（宿主机）: 127.0.0.1:${SK_MYSQL_PORT}"
  log_info "数据库用户: surveyking / 密码: 见 .env(MYSQL_PASSWORD)"
  echo
  log_info "💡 需要技术支持和更多功能？"
  log_info "获取 SurveyKing 企业版: https://surveyking.cn/pricing"
  echo
  log_warn "注意：MySQL 初始化只在 ./mysql/data 为空时执行；如需重置请清空该目录后重启。"
}
main "$@"

FROM openjdk:8-jdk-alpine
ARG JAR_FILE=build/libs/*.jar
COPY ${JAR_FILE} app.jar
COPY surveyking.mv.db surveyking.mv.db 
RUN mkdir /surveyking
VOLUME /files
VOLUME /logs
ENTRYPOINT ["sh", "-c", "java ${JAVA_OPTS} -jar /app.jar ${0} ${@}"]

1→version: 1.10.0
     2→spring:
     3→  application:
     4→    name: survey
     5→  profiles:
     6→    active: @activeProfile@ # maven 配置
     7→#    active: ${activeProfile} # gradle 配置
     8→  mvc:
     9→    async:
    10→      request-timeout: -1
    11→    static-path-pattern: /notfound # 覆盖默认的 /**
    12→    throw-exception-if-no-handler-found: true
    13→    pathmatch:
    14→      matching-strategy: ant_path_matcher
    15→  servlet:
    16→    multipart:
    17→      max-file-size: 2048MB
    18→      max-request-size: 2048MB
    19→  jackson:
    20→    default-property-inclusion: non_null # 序列化忽略空值
    21→    date-format: yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss
    22→    time-zone: GMT+8
    23→    serialization:
    24→      FAIL_ON_EMPTY_BEANS: false
    25→    deserialization:
    26→      FAIL_ON_UNKNOWN_PROPERTIES: false # 反序列化时允许未知属性
    27→sk:
    28→  security:
    29→    url-token-authentication:
    30→      enabled: true # 默认开启 url token 认证
    31→flowable:
    32→  async-executor-activate: false
    33→  database-schema-update: false
    34→
    35→aj:

file.content:
version: 1.10.0
spring:
  application:
    name: survey
  profiles:
    active: @activeProfile@ # maven 配置
#    active: ${activeProfile} # gradle 配置
  mvc:
    async:
      request-timeout: -1
    static-path-pattern: /notfound # 覆盖默认的 /**
    throw-exception-if-no-handler-found: true
    pathmatch:
      matching-strategy: ant_path_matcher
  servlet:
    multipart:
      max-file-size: 2048MB
      max-request-size: 2048MB
  jackson:
    default-property-inclusion: non_null # 序列化忽略空值
    date-format: yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss
    time-zone: GMT+8
    serialization:
      FAIL_ON_EMPTY_BEANS: false
    deserialization:
      FAIL_ON_UNKNOWN_PROPERTIES: false # 反序列化时允许未知属性
sk:
  security:
    url-token-authentication:
      enabled: true # 默认开启 url token 认证
flowable:
  async-executor-activate: false
  database-schema-update: false

aj:
  captcha:
    jigsaw: classpath:images/jigsaw # 滑动验证，底图路径，不配置将使用默认图片；以 classpath: 开头，取 resource 目录下路径
    pic-click: classpath:images/pic-click # 滑动验证，底图路径，不配置将使用默认图片；以 classpath: 开头，取 resource 目录下路径
    cache-type: local # 缓存 local/redis...
    cache-number: 1000 # local 缓存的阈值,达到这个值，清除缓存
    timing-clear: 180 # local定时清除过期缓存(单位秒),设置为0代表不执行
    type: blockPuzzle # 验证码类型 default两种都实例化。 blockPuzzle 滑块拼图 clickWord 文字点选
    water-mark: survey # 右下角水印文字(我的水印)，可使用 https://tool.chinaz.com/tools/unicode.aspx 中文转 Unicode，Linux 可能需要转 unicode
    interference-options: 2 # 滑动干扰项(0/1/2)
    req-frequency-limit-enable: false # 接口请求次数一分钟限制是否开启 true|false
    req-get-lock-limit: 5 # 验证失败5次，get接口锁定
    req-get-lock-seconds: 10 # 验证失败后，锁定时间间隔
    req-get-minute-limit: 30 # get 接口一分钟内请求数限制
    req-check-minute-limit: 60 # check 接口一分钟内请求数限制
    req-verify-minute-limit: 60 # verify 接口一分钟内请求数限制

api:
  prefix: /api

surveyking:
  ai:
    siliconflow:
      enabled: true
      base-url: https://api.siliconflow.cn
      token: ${AI_SILICONFLOW_TOKEN:your_token}
      model-id: deepseek-chat
      model-types:
        - display-name: "DeepSeek Chat"
          value: "deepseek-chat"
          description: "DeepSeek 对话模型"
        - display-name: "Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct"
          value: "Qwen/Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct"
          description: "Qwen2.5 72B 指令模型"
        - display-name: "Llama-3.1-70B-Instruct"
          value: "meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3.1-70B-Instruct"
          description: "Llama 3.1 70B 指令模型"

file.content:
server:
  port: 7007
  servlet:
    session:
      timeout: 1h
  compression:
    enabled: true
    min-response-size: 1024
file-storage:
  local:
    root-path: ./files
    # set the file path
    pathStrategy: byId
    dateFormat: yyyyMM/dd
    nameStrategy: seqAndOriginalName
custom-cache:
  entries:
    projectCache: 1d
    fileCache: 1h
    userCache: 1h
    deptCache: 1d
    projectPermissionCache: 1d
    commonCache: 30d

file.content:
SET NAMES utf8mb4;
SET FOREIGN_KEY_CHECKS = 0;

-- ----------------------------
-- Table structure for t_account
-- ----------------------------
CREATE TABLE `t_account` (
  `id` varchar(64) NOT NULL COMMENT 'ID',
  `user_type` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'SysUser' COMMENT '用户类型',
  `user_id` varchar(64) NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',
  `auth_type` varchar(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PWD' COMMENT '认证方式',
  `auth_account` varchar(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '用户名',
  `auth_secret` varchar(64) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '密码',
  `secret_salt` varchar(32) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '加密盐',
  `status` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '用户状态',
  `is_deleted` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '是否删除',
  `create_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间',
  `create_by` varchar(256) DEFAULT NULL,
  `update_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '更新时间',
  `update_by` varchar(256) DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3 COMMENT='登录账号';

-- ----------------------------
-- Records of t_account
-- ----------------------------
BEGIN;
INSERT INTO `t_account` (`id`, `user_type`, `user_id`, `auth_type`, `auth_account`, `auth_secret`, `secret_salt`, `status`, `is_deleted`, `create_at`, `create_by`, `update_at`, `update_by`) VALUES ('1', 'SysUser', '1457995481966747649', 'PWD', 'admin', '$2a$10$vZk9P3XtbD2KrdLbQYPvBuPAkkUda0OlkDg7io1Q6VEtfFPig/tqO', NULL, 1, 0, '2021-11-09 16:56:26', NULL, '2022-02-01 23:57:27', '1457995481966747649');
COMMIT;

-- ----------------------------
-- Table structure for t_answer
-- ----------------------------
CREATE TABLE `t_answer` (
  `id` varchar(64) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_bin NOT NULL,
  `project_id` varchar(64) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_bin NOT NULL,
  `temp_answer` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_bin COMMENT '暂存答案',
  `survey` longtext CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_bin COMMENT '问卷',
  `answer` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_bin COMMENT '问卷答案',
  `attachment` varchar(1024) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_bin DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '问卷元数据',
  `meta_info` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_bin COMMENT '问卷元数据',
  `temp_save` int DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '0暂存 1已完成',
  `exam_info` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_bin COMMENT '考试信息',
  `exam_exercise_type` varchar(4) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_bin DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '考试练习类型',
  `exam_score` float DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '考试分数',
  `is_deleted` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '是否删除',
  `create_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间',
  `create_by` varchar(256) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_bin DEFAULT NULL,
  `update_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '更新时间',
  `update_by` varchar(256) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_bin DEFAULT NULL,

好，爹，信息收集完毕。先列下影响范围，确认后动手：

## 要创建的文件

| 文件 | 用途 |
|------|------|
| `deploy/docker-compose.yml` | 部署用，自建镜像（Maven 构建），MySQL + App |
| `deploy/Dockerfile` | 多阶段构建：Maven 编译 + JDK 8 运行 |
| `.gitlab-ci.yml` | CI/CD：构建镜像 → 推送 Registry → 部署测试/生产 |
| `deploy/DEPLOY.md` | 部署文档 |

## 关键设计决策需要你定：

1. **Docker 镜像仓库地址**：推到哪？GitLab 自带的 Container Registry（`pt-gitlab.yottastudios.com:5050/luobeilin/survey-king`）还是其他？
2. **测试/生产服务器**：部署到哪台机器？需要 SSH 地址。还是说先写占位符，你后面填？
3. **测试环境和生产环境的 MySQL**：各自用 Docker 内的 MySQL，还是连外部已有的 MySQL？

先回答这几个，我好写。

content.content: D:\project\pt-gitlab\survey-king\deploy\.gitlab-ci.yml.参考

1→variables:
     2→  EXCLUDE_OPTIONS: "--exclude=.git --exclude=.gitignore --exclude=.env"
     3→  TESTSERVER_PROJECT_FOLDER: "/home/game/apitable"
     4→  STAGING_PROJECT_FOLDER: "/home/game/apitable-staging"
     5→
     6→cache:
     7→  key: "node-modules-${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}"
     8→  paths:
     9→    - node_modules/
    10→    - .next/cache/
    11→
    12→stages:
    13→  - check
    14→  - test
    15→  - build_base # 构建基础镜像
    16→  - build_push
    17→  - deploy
    18→
    19→# global before_script
    20→before_script:
    21→  - chmod 777 $CI_PROJECT_DIR/ -R
    22→  - export SEMVER_BUILD=${CI_PIPELINE_ID}.${CI_COMMIT_SHA}
    23→  - export SEMVER_FULL="${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}+${SEMVER_BUILD}"
    24→  - echo $SEMVER_FULL
    25→
    26→echo-img-tag:
    27→  tags:
    28→    - shell
    29→  stage: check
    30→  rules:
    31→    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "testserver"
    32→    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "master"
    33→      when: manual
    34→  script:
    35→    - echo $SEMVER_FULL
    36→    - echo $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH
    37→    - echo $CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA
    38→
    39→build-base:
    40→  tags:
    41→    - docker
    42→  stage: build_base
    43→  image: docker:27-cli
    44→  only:
    45→    refs:
    46→      - testserver
    47→      - staging
    48→      - master
    49→    changes:
    50→      - packaging/**/*
    51→  script:
    52→    - cd packaging/node-base
    53→    - docker build . -f ./Dockerfile.builder -t 192.168.0.63:5000/xapitable/node-base-builder-${CI_COMMIT_BRANCH}:latest

   430→    - git fetch -q --prune --tags "origin"
   431→    - git checkout -B master remotes/origin/master
   432→

   435→    - git config user.name "$GITLAB_USER_NAME"
   436→    - 'git commit --allow-empty -m "$CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE (SHA: $CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA)"'
