   438→    - echo "部署留痕提交完成"

file.content:
variables:
  EXCLUDE_OPTIONS: "--exclude=.git --exclude=.gitignore --exclude=.env"
  TESTSERVER_PROJECT_FOLDER: "/home/game/apitable"
  STAGING_PROJECT_FOLDER: "/home/game/apitable-staging"

cache:
  key: "node-modules-${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}"
  paths:
    - node_modules/
    - .next/cache/

stages:
  - check
  - test
  - build_base # 构建基础镜像
  - build_push
  - deploy

# global before_script
before_script:
  - chmod 777 $CI_PROJECT_DIR/ -R
  - export SEMVER_BUILD=${CI_PIPELINE_ID}.${CI_COMMIT_SHA}
  - export SEMVER_FULL="${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}+${SEMVER_BUILD}"
  - echo $SEMVER_FULL

echo-img-tag:
  tags:
    - shell
  stage: check
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "testserver"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "master"
      when: manual
  script:
    - echo $SEMVER_FULL
    - echo $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH
    - echo $CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA

build-base:
  tags:
    - docker
  stage: build_base
  image: docker:27-cli
  only:
    refs:
      - testserver
      - staging
      - master
    changes:
      - packaging/**/*
  script:
    - cd packaging/node-base
    - docker build . -f ./Dockerfile.builder -t 192.168.0.63:5000/xapitable/node-base-builder-${CI_COMMIT_BRANCH}:latest
    - docker build . -f ./Dockerfile.runner -t 192.168.0.63:5000/xapitable/node-base-runner-${CI_COMMIT_BRANCH}:latest
    - docker push 192.168.0.63:5000/xapitable/node-base-builder-${CI_COMMIT_BRANCH}:latest
    - docker push 192.168.0.63:5000/xapitable/node-base-runner-${CI_COMMIT_BRANCH}:latest
    - echo "xapitable node-base builder runner 构建上传成功"


# 预发布
build-init-db-staging:
  tags:
    - docker
  stage: build_push
  image: docker:27-cli
  only:
    refs:
      - staging
    changes:
      - init-db/**/*
  script:
    - docker build ./init-db -f ./init-db/Dockerfile --build-arg SEMVER_FULL=${SEMVER_FULL} -t 192.168.0.63:5000/xapitable-init-db-staging:latest
    - docker push 192.168.0.63:5000/xapitable-init-db-staging:latest
    - echo "192.168.0.63:5000/xapitable-init-db-staging:latest build successfully"

build-imageproxy-server-staging:
  tags:
    - docker
  stage: build_push
  image: docker:27-cli
  only:
    refs:
      - staging
    changes:
      - yotta/imageproxy-server/**/*
  script:
    - docker build ./yotta/imageproxy-server -f ./yotta/imageproxy-server/Dockerfile --build-arg SEMVER_FULL=${SEMVER_FULL} -t 192.168.0.63:5000/xapitable-imageproxy-server-staging:latest
    - docker push 192.168.0.63:5000/xapitable-imageproxy-server-staging:latest
    - echo "192.168.0.63:5000/xapitable-imageproxy-server-staging:latest build successfully"

build-backend-server-staging:
  tags:
    - docker
  stage: build_push
  image: docker:27-cli
  only:
    refs:
      - staging
    changes:
      - backend-server/**/*
      - packaging/Dockerfile.backend-server
  script:
    - docker build . -f ./packaging/Dockerfile.backend-server --build-arg SEMVER_FULL=${SEMVER_FULL} -t 192.168.0.63:5000/xapitable-backend-server-staging:latest
    - docker push 192.168.0.63:5000/xapitable-backend-server-staging:latest
    - echo "192.168.0.63:5000/xapitable-backend-server-staging:latest build successfully"

build-room-server-staging:
  tags:
    - docker
  stage: build_push
  image: docker:27-cli
  only:
    refs:
      - staging
    changes:
      - packages/room-native-api/**/*
      - packages/room-server/**/*
      - packages/core/**/*
      - packaging/Dockerfile.room-server
  script:
    - docker build .
      -f ./packaging/Dockerfile.room-server
      -t 192.168.0.63:5000/xapitable-room-server-staging:latest
      --build-arg SEMVER_FULL=${SEMVER_FULL}
      --build-arg CI_COMMIT_BRANCH=${CI_COMMIT_BRANCH}
    - docker push 192.168.0.63:5000/xapitable-room-server-staging:latest
    - echo "192.168.0.63:5000/xapitable-room-server-staging:latest build successfully"

build-web-server-staging:
  tags:
    - docker
  stage: build_push
  image: docker:27-cli
  only:
    refs:
      - staging
    changes:
      - packages/**/*
      - packaging/Dockerfile.web-server
  script:
    - docker build .
      -f ./packaging/Dockerfile.web-server
      -t 192.168.0.63:5000/xapitable-web-server-staging:latest
      --build-arg SEMVER_FULL=${SEMVER_FULL}
      --build-arg CI_COMMIT_BRANCH=${CI_COMMIT_BRANCH}
    - docker push 192.168.0.63:5000/xapitable-web-server-staging:latest
    - echo "192.168.0.63:5000/xapitable-web-server-staging:latest build successfully"

build-openresty-staging:
  tags:
    - docker
  stage: build_push
  image: docker:27-cli
  only:

deploy-prod-master:

    DIST_REPO: "https://oauth2:mTVn_6baAR8Koua-ZGcB@pt-gitlab.yottastudios.com/px/apitable/deployment.git"
  script:
    - export CACHE_DIR=${HOME}/${CACHE_DIR}

    - if ! [ -e $CACHE_DIR ]; then git clone -q $DIST_REPO $CACHE_DIR; fi
    - cd $CACHE_DIR
    - git fetch -q --prune --tags "origin"
    - git checkout -B master remotes/origin/master

    - cd $CACHE_DIR
    - git config user.email "$GITLAB_USER_EMAIL"
    - git config user.name "$GITLAB_USER_NAME"
    - 'git commit --allow-empty -m "$CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE (SHA: $CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA)"'
    - git push -q "origin" master:master
    - echo "部署留痕提交完成"

content.thinking:
Now I understand the pattern. The reference CI uses:
- `192.168.0.63:5000` as the private Docker registry
- `testserver` branch for test deployments
- `master` branch for production
- `docker` and `shell` tagged runners
- kubectl for deployment (K8s)
- SSH deploy for production

For SurveyKing, I need to adapt this:
- Single service (not multiple like apitable)
- Maven build with JDK 8
- Docker compose for deployment (not K8s, since user said Docker internal MySQL)
- Same registry `192.168.0.63:5000`


- Same branch pattern: `testserver` for test, `master` for production
- Both test and production deploy to the same server infrastructure using docker-compose

The user mentioned deploying to the same environment as the reference project, so I should follow that infrastructure pattern but swap kubectl for docker-compose since SurveyKing uses internal MySQL rather than a separate database service.

For the deployment strategy: build the Docker image and push it to the local registry at `192.168.0.63:5000`, then use SSH with docker-compose to pull and run the container on the target server. This keeps things simple and consistent with their existing setup.

Now I'll start writing out the deployment configuration files.

input.content:
# ============ 阶段1: Maven 构建 ============
FROM maven:3.8-openjdk-8 AS builder

WORKDIR /build

# 先复制 pom.xml，利用 Docker 缓存层加速依赖下载
COPY server/pom.xml ./pom.xml
COPY server/shared/pom.xml ./shared/pom.xml
COPY server/rdbms/pom.xml ./rdbms/pom.xml
COPY server/ai/pom.xml ./ai/pom.xml
COPY server/api/pom.xml ./api/pom.xml

# 下载依赖（利用缓存，源码不变则不重复下载）
RUN mvn dependency:go-offline -B 2>/dev/null || true

# 复制全部源码
COPY server/ .

# 构建（跳过测试）
RUN mvn clean package -DskipTests -B

# ============ 阶段2: 运行环境 ============
FROM openjdk:8-jdk-alpine

LABEL maintainer="surveyking"

WORKDIR /app

# 从构建阶段复制 jar
COPY --from=builder /build/api/target/*.jar app.jar

# 复制初始化 SQL（供 docker-compose 挂载使用）
COPY server/rdbms/src/main/resources/scripts/init-mysql.sql /app/init-mysql.sql

# 创建数据目录
RUN mkdir -p /app/files /app/logs

VOLUME ["/app/files", "/app/logs"]

EXPOSE 1991

ENTRYPOINT ["sh", "-c", "java ${JAVA_OPTS} -jar /app/app.jar ${0} ${@}"]

input.content:
version: "3.8"

services:
  mysql:
    image: mysql:8.0
    container_name: surveyking-mysql-${ENV:-test}
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: ${MYSQL_PASSWORD:-surveyking}
      MYSQL_DATABASE: surveyking
      MYSQL_USER: surveyking
      MYSQL_PASSWORD: ${MYSQL_PASSWORD:-surveyking}
    volumes:
      - mysql_data:/var/lib/mysql
      - ./sqls:/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d:ro
    ports:
      - "${MYSQL_PORT:-3306}:3306"
    networks:
      - surveyking-net
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "mysqladmin", "ping", "-h", "localhost"]
      timeout: 20s
      retries: 10
      start_period: 40s
      interval: 30s
    command: >
      --character-set-server=utf8mb4
      --collation-server=utf8mb4_unicode_ci
      --default-time-zone=+08:00
      --log-bin-trust-function-creators=1

  app:
    image: ${APP_IMAGE:-192.168.0.63:5000/surveyking:latest}
    container_name: surveyking-app-${ENV:-test}
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE: pro
      SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL: jdbc:mysql://mysql:3306/surveyking?rewriteBatchedStatements=true&useUnicode=true&characterEncoding=UTF-8&useSSL=false&allowPublicKeyRetrieval=true&serverTimezone=Asia/Shanghai
      SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME: surveyking
      SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD: ${MYSQL_PASSWORD:-surveyking}
      SPRING_DATASOURCE_DRIVER_CLASS_NAME: com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver
      AI_SILICONFLOW_TOKEN: ${AI_SILICONFLOW_TOKEN:-your_token}
      TZ: Asia/Shanghai
      JAVA_OPTS: "${JAVA_OPTS:--Xms512m -Xmx1g -Dfile.encoding=UTF-8}"
    volumes:
      - app_files:/app/files
      - app_logs:/app/logs
    depends_on:
      mysql:
        condition: service_healthy
    ports:
      - "${APP_PORT:-1991}:1991"
    networks:
      - surveyking-net
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "wget -qO- http://localhost:1991/api/public/project/list?pageNo=1&pageSize=1 || exit 1"]
      timeout: 30s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 60s
      interval: 30s

networks:
  surveyking-net:
    driver: bridge

volumes:
  mysql_data:
  app_files:
  app_logs:

  REGISTRY: "192.168.0.63:5000"
  IMAGE_TEST: "${REGISTRY}/surveyking:latest"
  IMAGE_PROD: "${REGISTRY}/surveyking-prod:latest"
  # 部署目录（服务器上）
  DEPLOY_DIR_TEST: "/home/game/surveyking-test"
  DEPLOY_DIR_PROD: "/home/game/surveyking-prod"

stages:
  - check
  - build_push
  - deploy

before_script:
  - export SEMVER_BUILD=${CI_PIPELINE_ID}.${CI_COMMIT_SHA}
  - export SEMVER_FULL="${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}+${SEMVER_BUILD}"
  - echo "版本号 ${SEMVER_FULL}"

# ======================== Check ========================

echo-info:
  tags:
    - shell
  stage: check
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "testserver"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "master"
      when: manual
  script:
    - echo "分支 ${CI_COMMIT_BRANCH}"
    - echo "版本 ${SEMVER_FULL}"
    - echo "提交 ${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"

# ======================== 测试环境（testserver 分支） ========================

build-test:
  tags:
    - docker
  stage: build_push
  image: docker:27-cli
  only:
    refs:
      - testserver
    changes:
      - server/**/*
      - deploy/Dockerfile
  script:
    - docker build .
      -f ./deploy/Dockerfile
      --build-arg SEMVER_FULL=${SEMVER_FULL}
      -t ${IMAGE_TEST}
    - docker push ${IMAGE_TEST}
    - echo "${IMAGE_TEST} 构建推送成功"

deploy-test:
  tags:
    - shell
  stage: deploy
  only:
    refs:
      - testserver
    changes:
      - server/**/*
      - deploy/**/*
  script:
    - echo "部署测试环境..."
    # 确保部署目录存在
    - mkdir -p ${DEPLOY_DIR_TEST}/sqls
    # 复制部署文件
    - cp deploy/docker-compose.yml ${DEPLOY_DIR_TEST}/docker-compose.yml
    - cp deploy/.env.test ${DEPLOY_DIR_TEST}/.env
    - cp server/rdbms/src/main/resources/scripts/init-mysql.sql ${DEPLOY_DIR_TEST}/sqls/init-mysql.sql
    # 拉取最新镜像并重启
    - cd ${DEPLOY_DIR_TEST}
    - docker compose pull app
    - docker compose up -d
    - echo "测试环境部署完成"
    - echo "访问地址 http://$(hostname -I | awk '{print $1}'):$(grep APP_PORT .env | cut -d= -f2)"

# ======================== 生产环境（master 分支） ========================

build-prod:
  tags:
    - docker
  stage: build_push
  image: docker:27-cli
  only:
    refs:
      - master
    changes:
      - server/**/*
      - deploy/Dockerfile
  script:
    - docker build .
      -f ./deploy/Dockerfile
      --build-arg SEMVER_FULL=${SEMVER_FULL}
      -t ${IMAGE_PROD}
    - docker tag ${IMAGE_PROD} ${REGISTRY}/surveyking-prod:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
    - docker push ${IMAGE_PROD}
    - docker push ${REGISTRY}/surveyking-prod:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
    - echo "${IMAGE_PROD} 构建推送成功（tag: ${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}）"

deploy-prod:
  tags:
    - shell
  stage: deploy
  only:
    refs:
      - master
  when: manual
  script:
    - echo "部署生产环境（手动触发）..."
    # 确保部署目录存在
    - mkdir -p ${DEPLOY_DIR_PROD}/sqls
    # 复制部署文件
    - cp deploy/docker-compose.yml ${DEPLOY_DIR_PROD}/docker-compose.yml
    - cp deploy/.env.prod ${DEPLOY_DIR_PROD}/.env
    - cp server/rdbms/src/main/resources/scripts/init-mysql.sql ${DEPLOY_DIR_PROD}/sqls/init-mysql.sql
    # 拉取最新镜像并重启
    - cd ${DEPLOY_DIR_PROD}
    - docker compose pull app
    - docker compose up -d
    - echo "生产环境部署完成"
    - echo "访问地址 http://$(hostname -I | awk '{print $1}'):$(grep APP_PORT .env | cut -d= -f2)"

input.content:
# SurveyKing 部署文档

## 架构概览

```
GitLab CI/CD
  ├── testserver 分支 → 自动构建 → 自动部署测试环境
  └── master 分支    → 自动构建 → 手动触发部署生产环境

镜像仓库: 192.168.0.63:5000
  ├── surveyking:latest        (测试)
  └── surveyking-prod:latest   (生产)
```

## 环境说明

| 环境 | 触发分支 | 部署方式 | 服务器目录 | 应用端口 | MySQL 端口 |
|------|----------|----------|------------|----------|------------|
| 测试 | testserver | 自动 | /home/game/surveyking-test | 1991 | 13306 |
| 生产 | master | 手动 | /home/game/surveyking-prod | 1991 | 23306 |

## CI/CD 流程

### 测试环境
1. 推送代码到 `testserver` 分支
2. CI 自动构建 Docker 镜像并推送到 `192.168.0.63:5000/surveyking:latest`
3. CI 自动拉取镜像并通过 docker-compose 部署

### 生产环境
1. 推送代码到 `master` 分支
2. CI 自动构建 Docker 镜像并推送到 `192.168.0.63:5000/surveyking-prod:latest`
3. 同时打 commit SHA 标签：`surveyking-prod:<commit-sha>`（用于回滚）
4. **手动** 在 GitLab Pipeline 页面点击 deploy-prod 触发部署

## 首次部署

### 1. 准备服务器目录

```bash
# 测试环境
mkdir -p /home/game/surveyking-test/sqls

# 生产环境
mkdir -p /home/game/surveyking-prod/sqls
```

### 2. 复制配置文件

```bash
# 测试环境
cp deploy/docker-compose.yml /home/game/surveyking-test/
cp deploy/.env.test /home/game/surveyking-test/.env
cp server/rdbms/src/main/resources/scripts/init-mysql.sql /home/game/surveyking-test/sqls/

# 生产环境
cp deploy/docker-compose.yml /home/game/surveyking-prod/
cp deploy/.env.prod /home/game/surveyking-prod/.env
cp server/rdbms/src/main/resources/scripts/init-mysql.sql /home/game/surveyking-prod/sqls/
```

### 3. 修改密码（重要）

编辑 `.env` 文件，修改 `MYSQL_PASSWORD` 为强密码：
```bash
vi /home/game/surveyking-prod/.env
```

### 4. 启动服务

```bash
cd /home/game/surveyking-test  # 或 surveyking-prod
docker compose up -d
```

## 日常运维

### 查看服务状态
```bash
cd /home/game/surveyking-test  # 或 surveyking-prod
docker compose ps
```

### 查看日志
```bash
# 应用日志
docker compose logs -f app

# MySQL 日志
docker compose logs -f mysql

# 最近 100 行
docker compose logs --tail=100 app
```

### 重启服务
```bash
# 重启应用（不影响数据库）
docker compose restart app

# 重启全部
docker compose restart
```

### 回滚（生产环境）
```bash
cd /home/game/surveyking-prod

# 1. 修改 .env 中的 APP_IMAGE 为指定版本
#    APP_IMAGE=192.168.0.63:5000/surveyking-prod:<commit-sha>
vi .env

# 2. 重新部署
docker compose pull app
docker compose up -d
```

### 数据库备份
```bash
cd /home/game/surveyking-prod
MYSQL_PASSWORD=$(grep MYSQL_PASSWORD .env | cut -d'=' -f2)

# 备份
docker compose exec mysql mysqldump -u surveyking -p${MYSQL_PASSWORD} surveyking > backup_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).sql

# 恢复
docker compose exec -i mysql mysql -u surveyking -p${MYSQL_PASSWORD} surveyking < backup_20260409.sql
```

### 连接数据库
```bash
# 测试环境
mysql -h 127.0.0.1 -P 13306 -u surveyking -p surveyking

# 生产环境
mysql -h 127.0.0.1 -P 23306 -u surveyking -p surveyking
```

## 配置说明

### .env 环境变量

| 变量 | 说明 | 默认值 |
|------|------|--------|
| ENV | 环境标识（影响容器名后缀） | test |
| APP_PORT | 应用对外端口 | 1991 |
| MYSQL_PORT | MySQL 对外端口 | 3306 |
| MYSQL_PASSWORD | MySQL 密码 | surveyking |
| APP_IMAGE | 应用镜像地址 | 192.168.0.63:5000/surveyking:latest |
| AI_SILICONFLOW_TOKEN | AI 功能 Token | your_token |
| JAVA_OPTS | JVM 参数 | -Xms512m -Xmx1g |

## 访问信息

- 前端页面：`http://<服务器IP>:<APP_PORT>`
- 默认账号：`admin` / `123456`
- **部署后请立即修改默认密码**

content.text:
搞定了爹。总结一下创建的文件：

## 新建文件清单

| 文件 | 用途 |
|------|------|
| `deploy/Dockerfile` | 多阶段构建：Maven 3.8 + JDK 8 编译 → JDK 8 Alpine 运行 |
| `deploy/docker-compose.yml` | 通用部署编排，通过 `.env` 区分测试/生产 |
| `deploy/.env.test` | 测试环境配置（MySQL 端口 13306） |
| `deploy/.env.prod` | 生产环境配置（MySQL 端口 23306） |
| `.gitlab-ci.yml` | CI/CD 流水线 |
| `deploy/DEPLOY.md` | 部署文档 |

## CI/CD 流程

- **`testserver` 分支**：推送 → 自动构建镜像 → 推到 `192.168.0.63:5000/surveyking:latest` → 自动部署
- **`master` 分支**：推送 → 自动构建镜像 → 推到 `192.168.0.63:5000/surveyking-prod:latest` + commit SHA tag → **手动触发**部署

## 关键设计

- 参考文件的模式：`docker` runner 构建镜像，`shell` runner 本地部署
- 测试和生产共用一个 `docker-compose.yml`，通过 `.env` 文件区分
- 生产部署需手动触发（`when: manual`），防止误操作
- 生产镜像额外打 commit SHA tag，支持回滚
- MySQL 各自独立容器，端口错开不冲突

**需要你改的地方：** `.env.prod` 里的 `MYSQL_PASSWORD` 改成强密码，`AI_SILICONFLOW_TOKEN` 填上真实 token。

file.content:
# SurveyKing 部署文档

## 架构概览

```
GitLab CI/CD
  ├── testserver 分支 → 自动构建 → 自动部署测试环境
  └── master 分支    → 自动构建 → 手动触发部署生产环境

镜像仓库: 192.168.0.63:5000
  ├── surveyking:latest        (测试)
  └── surveyking-prod:latest   (生产)
```

## 环境说明

| 环境 | 触发分支 | 部署方式 | 服务器目录 | 应用端口 | MySQL 端口 |
|------|----------|----------|------------|----------|------------|
| 测试 | testserver | 自动 | /home/game/surveyking-test | 1991 | 13306 |
| 生产 | master | 手动 | /home/game/surveyking-prod | 1991 | 23306 |

## CI/CD 流程

### 测试环境
1. 推送代码到 `testserver` 分支
2. CI 自动构建 Docker 镜像并推送到 `192.168.0.63:5000/surveyking:latest`
3. CI 自动拉取镜像并通过 docker-compose 部署

### 生产环境
1. 推送代码到 `master` 分支
2. CI 自动构建 Docker 镜像并推送到 `192.168.0.63:5000/surveyking-prod:latest`
3. 同时打 commit SHA 标签：`surveyking-prod:<commit-sha>`（用于回滚）
4. **手动** 在 GitLab Pipeline 页面点击 deploy-prod 触发部署

## 首次部署

### 1. 准备服务器目录

```bash
# 测试环境
mkdir -p /home/game/surveyking-test/sqls

# 生产环境
mkdir -p /home/game/surveyking-prod/sqls
```

### 2. 复制配置文件

```bash
# 测试环境
cp deploy/docker-compose.yml /home/game/surveyking-test/
cp deploy/.env.test /home/game/surveyking-test/.env
cp server/rdbms/src/main/resources/scripts/init-mysql.sql /home/game/surveyking-test/sqls/

# 生产环境
cp deploy/docker-compose.yml /home/game/surveyking-prod/
cp deploy/.env.prod /home/game/surveyking-prod/.env
cp server/rdbms/src/main/resources/scripts/init-mysql.sql /home/game/surveyking-prod/sqls/
```

### 3. 修改密码（重要）

编辑 `.env` 文件，修改 `MYSQL_PASSWORD` 为强密码：
```bash
vi /home/game/surveyking-prod/.env
```

### 4. 启动服务

```bash
cd /home/game/surveyking-test  # 或 surveyking-prod
docker compose up -d
```

## 日常运维

### 查看服务状态
```bash
cd /home/game/surveyking-test  # 或 surveyking-prod
docker compose ps
```

### 查看日志
```bash
# 应用日志
docker compose logs -f app

# MySQL 日志
docker compose logs -f mysql

# 最近 100 行
docker compose logs --tail=100 app
```

### 重启服务
```bash
# 重启应用（不影响数据库）
docker compose restart app

# 重启全部
docker compose restart
```

### 回滚（生产环境）
```bash
cd /home/game/surveyking-prod

# 1. 修改 .env 中的 APP_IMAGE 为指定版本
#    APP_IMAGE=192.168.0.63:5000/surveyking-prod:<commit-sha>
vi .env

# 2. 重新部署
docker compose pull app
docker compose up -d
```

### 数据库备份
```bash
cd /home/game/surveyking-prod
MYSQL_PASSWORD=$(grep MYSQL_PASSWORD .env | cut -d'=' -f2)

# 备份
docker compose exec mysql mysqldump -u surveyking -p${MYSQL_PASSWORD} surveyking > backup_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).sql

# 恢复
docker compose exec -i mysql mysql -u surveyking -p${MYSQL_PASSWORD} surveyking < backup_20260409.sql
```

### 连接数据库
```bash
# 测试环境
mysql -h 127.0.0.1 -P 13306 -u surveyking -p surveyking

# 生产环境
mysql -h 127.0.0.1 -P 23306 -u surveyking -p surveyking
```

## 配置说明

### .env 环境变量

| 变量 | 说明 | 默认值 |
|------|------|--------|
| ENV | 环境标识（影响容器名后缀） | test |
| APP_PORT | 应用对外端口 | 1991 |
| MYSQL_PORT | MySQL 对外端口 | 3306 |
| MYSQL_PASSWORD | MySQL 密码 | surveyking |
| APP_IMAGE | 应用镜像地址 | 192.168.0.63:5000/surveyking:latest |
| AI_SILICONFLOW_TOKEN | AI 功能 Token | your_token |
| JAVA_OPTS | JVM 参数 | -Xms512m -Xmx1g |

## 访问信息

- 前端页面：`http://<服务器IP>:<APP_PORT>`
- 默认账号：`admin` / `123456`
- **部署后请立即修改默认密码**

file.content:
variables:
  REGISTRY: "192.168.0.63:5000"
  IMAGE_TEST: "${REGISTRY}/surveyking:latest"
  IMAGE_PROD: "${REGISTRY}/surveyking-prod:latest"
  # 部署目录（服务器上）
  DEPLOY_DIR_TEST: "/home/game/surveyking-test"
  DEPLOY_DIR_PROD: "/home/game/surveyking-prod"

stages:
  - check
  - build_push
  - deploy

before_script:
  - export SEMVER_BUILD=${CI_PIPELINE_ID}.${CI_COMMIT_SHA}
  - export SEMVER_FULL="${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}+${SEMVER_BUILD}"
  - echo "版本号 ${SEMVER_FULL}"

# ======================== Check ========================

echo-info:
  tags:
    - shell
  stage: check
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "testserver"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "master"
      when: manual
  script:
    - echo "分支 ${CI_COMMIT_BRANCH}"
    - echo "版本 ${SEMVER_FULL}"
    - echo "提交 ${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"

# ======================== 测试环境（testserver 分支） ========================

build-test:
  tags:
    - docker
  stage: build_push
  image: docker:27-cli
  only:
    refs:
      - testserver
    changes:
      - server/**/*
      - deploy/Dockerfile
  script:
    - docker build .
      -f ./deploy/Dockerfile
      --build-arg SEMVER_FULL=${SEMVER_FULL}
      -t ${IMAGE_TEST}
    - docker push ${IMAGE_TEST}
    - echo "${IMAGE_TEST} 构建推送成功"

deploy-test:
  tags:
    - shell
  stage: deploy
  only:
    refs:
      - testserver
    changes:
      - server/**/*
      - deploy/**/*
  script:
    - echo "部署测试环境..."
    # 确保部署目录存在
    - mkdir -p ${DEPLOY_DIR_TEST}/sqls
    # 复制部署文件
    - cp deploy/docker-compose.yml ${DEPLOY_DIR_TEST}/docker-compose.yml
    - cp deploy/.env.test ${DEPLOY_DIR_TEST}/.env
    - cp server/rdbms/src/main/resources/scripts/init-mysql.sql ${DEPLOY_DIR_TEST}/sqls/init-mysql.sql
    # 拉取最新镜像并重启
    - cd ${DEPLOY_DIR_TEST}
    - docker compose pull app
    - docker compose up -d
    - echo "测试环境部署完成"
    - echo "访问地址 http://$(hostname -I | awk '{print $1}'):$(grep APP_PORT .env | cut -d= -f2)"

# ======================== 生产环境（master 分支） ========================

build-prod:
  tags:
    - docker
  stage: build_push
  image: docker:27-cli
  only:
    refs:
      - master
    changes:
      - server/**/*
      - deploy/Dockerfile
  script:
    - docker build .
      -f ./deploy/Dockerfile
      --build-arg SEMVER_FULL=${SEMVER_FULL}
      -t ${IMAGE_PROD}
    - docker tag ${IMAGE_PROD} ${REGISTRY}/surveyking-prod:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
    - docker push ${IMAGE_PROD}
    - docker push ${REGISTRY}/surveyking-prod:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
    - echo "${IMAGE_PROD} 构建推送成功（tag: ${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}）"

deploy-prod:
  tags:
    - shell
  stage: deploy
  only:
    refs:
      - master
  when: manual
  script:
    - echo "部署生产环境（手动触发）..."
    # 确保部署目录存在
    - mkdir -p ${DEPLOY_DIR_PROD}/sqls
    # 复制部署文件
    - cp deploy/docker-compose.yml ${DEPLOY_DIR_PROD}/docker-compose.yml
    - cp deploy/.env.prod ${DEPLOY_DIR_PROD}/.env
    - cp server/rdbms/src/main/resources/scripts/init-mysql.sql ${DEPLOY_DIR_PROD}/sqls/init-mysql.sql
    # 拉取最新镜像并重启
    - cd ${DEPLOY_DIR_PROD}
    - docker compose pull app
    - docker compose up -d
    - echo "生产环境部署完成"
    - echo "访问地址 http://$(hostname -I | awk '{print $1}'):$(grep APP_PORT .env | cut -d= -f2)"

content.text: 好，之前的 Dockerfile 和 .env 文件被你删了，我重新写。这次准备两套 docker-compose：内置 MySQL 和外部 MySQL。

input.content:
# ============ 阶段1: Maven 构建 ============
FROM maven:3.8-openjdk-8 AS builder

WORKDIR /build

# 先复制 pom.xml，利用 Docker 缓存层加速依赖下载
COPY server/pom.xml ./pom.xml
COPY server/shared/pom.xml ./shared/pom.xml
COPY server/rdbms/pom.xml ./rdbms/pom.xml
COPY server/ai/pom.xml ./ai/pom.xml
COPY server/api/pom.xml ./api/pom.xml

# 下载依赖（利用缓存，源码不变则不重复下载）
RUN mvn dependency:go-offline -B 2>/dev/null || true

# 复制全部源码
COPY server/ .

# 构建（跳过测试）
RUN mvn clean package -DskipTests -B

# ============ 阶段2: 运行环境 ============
FROM openjdk:8-jdk-alpine

LABEL maintainer="surveyking"

WORKDIR /app

# 从构建阶段复制 jar
COPY --from=builder /build/api/target/*.jar app.jar

# 创建数据目录
RUN mkdir -p /app/files /app/logs

VOLUME ["/app/files", "/app/logs"]

EXPOSE 1991

ENTRYPOINT ["sh", "-c", "java ${JAVA_OPTS} -jar /app/app.jar ${0} ${@}"]

input.content:
# ========================================================
# 模式一：内置 MySQL（默认）
#   使用方式: docker compose up -d
#
# 模式二：外部 MySQL
#   使用方式: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.external-db.yml up -d
#   或设置 COMPOSE_FILE 环境变量
# ========================================================

services:
  mysql:
    image: mysql:8.0
    container_name: surveyking-mysql-${ENV:-test}
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: ${MYSQL_PASSWORD:-surveyking}
      MYSQL_DATABASE: surveyking
      MYSQL_USER: surveyking
      MYSQL_PASSWORD: ${MYSQL_PASSWORD:-surveyking}
    volumes:
      - mysql_data:/var/lib/mysql
      - ./sqls:/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d:ro
    ports:
      - "${MYSQL_PORT:-3306}:3306"
    networks:
      - surveyking-net
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "mysqladmin", "ping", "-h", "localhost"]
      timeout: 20s
      retries: 10
      start_period: 40s
      interval: 30s
    command: >
      --character-set-server=utf8mb4
      --collation-server=utf8mb4_unicode_ci
      --default-time-zone=+08:00
      --log-bin-trust-function-creators=1

  app:
    image: ${APP_IMAGE:-192.168.0.63:5000/surveyking:latest}
    container_name: surveyking-app-${ENV:-test}
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE: pro
      SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL: jdbc:mysql://mysql:3306/surveyking?rewriteBatchedStatements=true&useUnicode=true&characterEncoding=UTF-8&useSSL=false&allowPublicKeyRetrieval=true&serverTimezone=Asia/Shanghai
      SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME: surveyking
      SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD: ${MYSQL_PASSWORD:-surveyking}
      SPRING_DATASOURCE_DRIVER_CLASS_NAME: com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver
      AI_SILICONFLOW_TOKEN: ${AI_SILICONFLOW_TOKEN:-your_token}
      TZ: Asia/Shanghai
      JAVA_OPTS: "${JAVA_OPTS:--Xms512m -Xmx1g -Dfile.encoding=UTF-8}"
    volumes:
      - app_files:/app/files
      - app_logs:/app/logs
    depends_on:
      mysql:
        condition: service_healthy
    ports:
      - "${APP_PORT:-1991}:1991"
    networks:
      - surveyking-net
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "wget -qO- http://localhost:1991/api/public/project/list?pageNo=1&pageSize=1 || exit 1"]
      timeout: 30s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 60s
      interval: 30s

networks:
  surveyking-net:
    driver: bridge

volumes:
  mysql_data:
  app_files:
  app_logs:

input.content:
# ========================================================
# 外部 MySQL 覆盖文件
# 用法: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.external-db.yml up -d
#
# 此文件会：
#   1. 移除内置 mysql 服务
#   2. 让 app 直连外部 MySQL（通过 .env 中的变量配置）
# ========================================================

services:
  # 禁用内置 mysql
  mysql:
    profiles:
      - disabled

  app:
    depends_on: {}
    environment:
      SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE: pro
      SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL: jdbc:mysql://${EXTERNAL_MYSQL_HOST}:${EXTERNAL_MYSQL_PORT:-3306}/${EXTERNAL_MYSQL_DB:-surveyking}?rewriteBatchedStatements=true&useUnicode=true&characterEncoding=UTF-8&useSSL=false&allowPublicKeyRetrieval=true&serverTimezone=Asia/Shanghai
      SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME: ${EXTERNAL_MYSQL_USER:-surveyking}
      SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD: ${EXTERNAL_MYSQL_PASSWORD}
      SPRING_DATASOURCE_DRIVER_CLASS_NAME: com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver
    # 外部数据库不走 docker 内部网络，需要用 host 网络或确保能访问
    extra_hosts:
      - "host.docker.internal:host-gateway"

content.text: 现在更新 `.gitlab-ci.yml`，deploy 阶段支持两种模式：

input.content:
variables:
  REGISTRY: "192.168.0.63:5000"
  IMAGE_TEST: "${REGISTRY}/surveyking:latest"
  IMAGE_PROD: "${REGISTRY}/surveyking-prod:latest"
  DEPLOY_DIR_TEST: "/home/game/surveyking-test"
  DEPLOY_DIR_PROD: "/home/game/surveyking-prod"

stages:
  - check
  - build_push
  - deploy

before_script:
  - export SEMVER_BUILD=${CI_PIPELINE_ID}.${CI_COMMIT_SHA}
  - export SEMVER_FULL="${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}+${SEMVER_BUILD}"
  - echo "版本号 ${SEMVER_FULL}"

# ======================== Check ========================

echo-info:
  tags:
    - shell
  stage: check
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "testserver"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "master"
      when: manual
  script:
    - echo "分支 ${CI_COMMIT_BRANCH}"
    - echo "版本 ${SEMVER_FULL}"
    - echo "提交 ${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"

# ======================== 测试环境（testserver 分支） ========================

build-test:
  tags:
    - docker
  stage: build_push
  image: docker:27-cli
  only:
    refs:
      - testserver
    changes:
      - server/**/*
      - deploy/Dockerfile
  script:
    - docker build .
      -f ./deploy/Dockerfile
      --build-arg SEMVER_FULL=${SEMVER_FULL}
      -t ${IMAGE_TEST}
    - docker push ${IMAGE_TEST}
    - echo "${IMAGE_TEST} 构建推送成功"

deploy-test:
  tags:
    - shell
  stage: deploy
  only:
    refs:
      - testserver
    changes:
      - server/**/*
      - deploy/**/*
  script:
    - echo "部署测试环境..."
    - mkdir -p ${DEPLOY_DIR_TEST}/sqls
    # 复制部署文件
    - cp deploy/docker-compose.yml ${DEPLOY_DIR_TEST}/docker-compose.yml
    - cp deploy/docker-compose.external-db.yml ${DEPLOY_DIR_TEST}/docker-compose.external-db.yml
    - cp deploy/.env.test ${DEPLOY_DIR_TEST}/.env
    - cp server/rdbms/src/main/resources/scripts/init-mysql.sql ${DEPLOY_DIR_TEST}/sqls/init-mysql.sql
    - cd ${DEPLOY_DIR_TEST}
    # 根据 .env 判断使用内置还是外部 MySQL
    - |
      if grep -q "^EXTERNAL_MYSQL_HOST=" .env && grep "^EXTERNAL_MYSQL_HOST=" .env | grep -vq "^#"; then
        echo "检测到外部 MySQL 配置，使用外部数据库模式"
        docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.external-db.yml pull app
        docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.external-db.yml up -d
      else
        echo "使用内置 MySQL 模式"
        docker compose pull app
        docker compose up -d
      fi
    - echo "测试环境部署完成"
    - echo "访问地址 http://$(hostname -I | awk '{print $1}'):$(grep APP_PORT .env | cut -d= -f2)"

# ======================== 生产环境（master 分支） ========================

build-prod:
  tags:
    - docker
  stage: build_push
  image: docker:27-cli
  only:
    refs:
      - master
    changes:
      - server/**/*
      - deploy/Dockerfile
  script:
    - docker build .
      -f ./deploy/Dockerfile
      --build-arg SEMVER_FULL=${SEMVER_FULL}
      -t ${IMAGE_PROD}
    - docker tag ${IMAGE_PROD} ${REGISTRY}/surveyking-prod:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
    - docker push ${IMAGE_PROD}
    - docker push ${REGISTRY}/surveyking-prod:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
    - echo "${IMAGE_PROD} 构建推送成功（tag: ${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}）"

deploy-prod:
  tags:
    - shell
  stage: deploy
  only:
    refs:
      - master
  when: manual
  script:
    - echo "部署生产环境（手动触发）..."
    - mkdir -p ${DEPLOY_DIR_PROD}/sqls
    # 复制部署文件
    - cp deploy/docker-compose.yml ${DEPLOY_DIR_PROD}/docker-compose.yml
    - cp deploy/docker-compose.external-db.yml ${DEPLOY_DIR_PROD}/docker-compose.external-db.yml
    - cp deploy/.env.prod ${DEPLOY_DIR_PROD}/.env
    - cp server/rdbms/src/main/resources/scripts/init-mysql.sql ${DEPLOY_DIR_PROD}/sqls/init-mysql.sql
    - cd ${DEPLOY_DIR_PROD}
    # 根据 .env 判断使用内置还是外部 MySQL
    - |
      if grep -q "^EXTERNAL_MYSQL_HOST=" .env && grep "^EXTERNAL_MYSQL_HOST=" .env | grep -vq "^#"; then
        echo "检测到外部 MySQL 配置，使用外部数据库模式"
        docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.external-db.yml pull app
        docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.external-db.yml up -d
      else
        echo "使用内置 MySQL 模式"
        docker compose pull app
        docker compose up -d
      fi
    - echo "生产环境部署完成"
    - echo "访问地址 http://$(hostname -I | awk '{print $1}'):$(grep APP_PORT .env | cut -d= -f2)"

        docker compose pull app
        docker compose up -d

toolUseResult.originalFile:
variables:
  REGISTRY: "192.168.0.63:5000"
  IMAGE_TEST: "${REGISTRY}/surveyking:latest"
  IMAGE_PROD: "${REGISTRY}/surveyking-prod:latest"
  # 部署目录（服务器上）
  DEPLOY_DIR_TEST: "/home/game/surveyking-test"
  DEPLOY_DIR_PROD: "/home/game/surveyking-prod"

stages:
  - check
  - build_push
  - deploy

before_script:
  - export SEMVER_BUILD=${CI_PIPELINE_ID}.${CI_COMMIT_SHA}
  - export SEMVER_FULL="${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}+${SEMVER_BUILD}"
  - echo "版本号 ${SEMVER_FULL}"

# ======================== Check ========================

echo-info:
  tags:
    - shell
  stage: check
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "testserver"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "master"
      when: manual
  script:
    - echo "分支 ${CI_COMMIT_BRANCH}"
    - echo "版本 ${SEMVER_FULL}"
    - echo "提交 ${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"

# ======================== 测试环境（testserver 分支） ========================

build-test:
  tags:
    - docker
  stage: build_push
  image: docker:27-cli
  only:
    refs:
      - testserver
    changes:
      - server/**/*
      - deploy/Dockerfile
  script:
    - docker build .
      -f ./deploy/Dockerfile
      --build-arg SEMVER_FULL=${SEMVER_FULL}
      -t ${IMAGE_TEST}
    - docker push ${IMAGE_TEST}
    - echo "${IMAGE_TEST} 构建推送成功"

deploy-test:
  tags:
    - shell
  stage: deploy
  only:
    refs:
      - testserver
    changes:
      - server/**/*
      - deploy/**/*
  script:
    - echo "部署测试环境..."
    # 确保部署目录存在
    - mkdir -p ${DEPLOY_DIR_TEST}/sqls
    # 复制部署文件
    - cp deploy/docker-compose.yml ${DEPLOY_DIR_TEST}/docker-compose.yml
    - cp deploy/.env.test ${DEPLOY_DIR_TEST}/.env
    - cp server/rdbms/src/main/resources/scripts/init-mysql.sql ${DEPLOY_DIR_TEST}/sqls/init-mysql.sql
    # 拉取最新镜像并重启
    - cd ${DEPLOY_DIR_TEST}
    - docker compose pull app
    - docker compose up -d
    - echo "测试环境部署完成"
    - echo "访问地址 http://$(hostname -I | awk '{print $1}'):$(grep APP_PORT .env | cut -d= -f2)"

# ======================== 生产环境（master 分支） ========================

build-prod:
  tags:
    - docker
  stage: build_push
  image: docker:27-cli
  only:
    refs:
      - master
    changes:
      - server/**/*
      - deploy/Dockerfile
  script:
    - docker build .
      -f ./deploy/Dockerfile
      --build-arg SEMVER_FULL=${SEMVER_FULL}
      -t ${IMAGE_PROD}
    - docker tag ${IMAGE_PROD} ${REGISTRY}/surveyking-prod:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
    - docker push ${IMAGE_PROD}
    - docker push ${REGISTRY}/surveyking-prod:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
    - echo "${IMAGE_PROD} 构建推送成功（tag: ${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}）"

deploy-prod:
  tags:
    - shell
  stage: deploy
  only:
    refs:
      - master
  when: manual
  script:
    - echo "部署生产环境（手动触发）..."
    # 确保部署目录存在
    - mkdir -p ${DEPLOY_DIR_PROD}/sqls
    # 复制部署文件
    - cp deploy/docker-compose.yml ${DEPLOY_DIR_PROD}/docker-compose.yml
    - cp deploy/.env.prod ${DEPLOY_DIR_PROD}/.env
    - cp server/rdbms/src/main/resources/scripts/init-mysql.sql ${DEPLOY_DIR_PROD}/sqls/init-mysql.sql
    # 拉取最新镜像并重启
    - cd ${DEPLOY_DIR_PROD}
    - docker compose pull app
    - docker compose up -d
    - echo "生产环境部署完成"
    - echo "访问地址 http://$(hostname -I | awk '{print $1}'):$(grep APP_PORT .env | cut -d= -f2)"

input.content:
# SurveyKing 部署文档

## 架构概览

```
GitLab CI/CD
  ├── testserver 分支 → 自动构建 → 自动部署测试环境
  └── master 分支    → 自动构建 → 手动触发部署生产环境

镜像仓库: 192.168.0.63:5000
  ├── surveyking:latest        (测试)
  └── surveyking-prod:latest   (生产)

数据库模式:
  ├── 模式一: Docker 内置 MySQL（默认）
  └── 模式二: 外部已有 MySQL
```

## 环境说明

| 环境 | 触发分支 | 部署方式 | 服务器目录 | 应用端口 |
|------|----------|----------|------------|----------|
| 测试 | testserver | 自动 | /home/game/surveyking-test | 1991 |
| 生产 | master | 手动 | /home/game/surveyking-prod | 1991 |

## 数据库模式

### 模式一：内置 MySQL（默认）

应用和 MySQL 都运行在 Docker 容器中，开箱即用。

```bash
docker compose up -d
```

### 模式二：外部已有 MySQL

只启动应用容器，连接外部 MySQL。

**步骤：**

1. 编辑 `.env`，取消注释外部 MySQL 配置：
```env
EXTERNAL_MYSQL_HOST=192.168.0.100
EXTERNAL_MYSQL_PORT=3306
EXTERNAL_MYSQL_DB=surveyking
EXTERNAL_MYSQL_USER=surveyking
EXTERNAL_MYSQL_PASSWORD=your_password
```

2. 在外部 MySQL 上执行初始化 SQL：
```bash
mysql -h 192.168.0.100 -u surveyking -p surveyking < sqls/init-mysql.sql
```

3. 使用 overlay 启动：
```bash
docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.external-db.yml up -d
```

> CI/CD 会自动判断 `.env` 中是否有 `EXTERNAL_MYSQL_HOST` 配置，自动选择对应模式。

## CI/CD 流程

### 测试环境
1. 推送代码到 `testserver` 分支
2. CI 自动构建 Docker 镜像推送到 `192.168.0.63:5000/surveyking:latest`
3. CI 自动部署（根据 `.env` 判断数据库模式）

### 生产环境
1. 推送代码到 `master` 分支
2. CI 自动构建镜像推送到 `192.168.0.63:5000/surveyking-prod:latest`
3. 同时打 commit SHA 标签（用于回滚）
4. **手动** 在 GitLab Pipeline 页面点击 deploy-prod 触发部署

## 首次部署

### 1. 准备目录

```bash
# 测试环境
mkdir -p /home/game/surveyking-test/sqls

# 生产环境
mkdir -p /home/game/surveyking-prod/sqls
```

### 2. 复制配置

```bash
# 测试环境
cp deploy/docker-compose.yml /home/game/surveyking-test/
cp deploy/docker-compose.external-db.yml /home/game/surveyking-test/
cp deploy/.env.test /home/game/surveyking-test/.env
cp server/rdbms/src/main/resources/scripts/init-mysql.sql /home/game/surveyking-test/sqls/

# 生产环境
cp deploy/docker-compose.yml /home/game/surveyking-prod/
cp deploy/docker-compose.external-db.yml /home/game/surveyking-prod/
cp deploy/.env.prod /home/game/surveyking-prod/.env
cp server/rdbms/src/main/resources/scripts/init-mysql.sql /home/game/surveyking-prod/sqls/
```

### 3. 修改密码（重要）

```bash
vi /home/game/surveyking-prod/.env
# 修改 MYSQL_PASSWORD 或 EXTERNAL_MYSQL_PASSWORD 为强密码
```

### 4. 启动

```bash
cd /home/game/surveyking-test  # 或 surveyking-prod

# 内置 MySQL 模式
docker compose up -d

# 外部 MySQL 模式
docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.external-db.yml up -d
```

## 日常运维

### 查看状态
```bash
docker compose ps
```

### 查看日志
```bash
docker compose logs -f app          # 应用日志
docker compose logs -f mysql        # MySQL 日志（内置模式）
docker compose logs --tail=100 app  # 最近 100 行
```

### 重启
```bash
docker compose restart app   # 只重启应用
docker compose restart       # 全部重启
```

### 回滚（生产环境）
```bash
cd /home/game/surveyking-prod

# 修改 .env 中 APP_IMAGE 为指定版本
# APP_IMAGE=192.168.0.63:5000/surveyking-prod:<commit-sha>
vi .env

# 重新部署
docker compose pull app
docker compose up -d
```

### 数据库备份（内置 MySQL 模式）
```bash
cd /home/game/surveyking-prod
MYSQL_PASSWORD=$(grep "^MYSQL_PASSWORD=" .env | cut -d'=' -f2)

# 备份
docker compose exec mysql mysqldump -u surveyking -p${MYSQL_PASSWORD} surveyking > backup_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).sql

# 恢复
docker compose exec -i mysql mysql -u surveyking -p${MYSQL_PASSWORD} surveyking < backup.sql
```

## .env 配置参考

| 变量 | 说明 | 默认值 |
|------|------|--------|
| ENV | 环境标识（容器名后缀） | test |
| APP_PORT | 应用端口 | 1991 |
| APP_IMAGE | 应用镜像 | 192.168.0.63:5000/surveyking:latest |
| JAVA_OPTS | JVM 参数 | -Xms512m -Xmx1g |
| AI_SILICONFLOW_TOKEN | AI Token | your_token |
| **内置 MySQL** | | |
| MYSQL_PORT | MySQL 对外端口 | 3306 |
| MYSQL_PASSWORD | MySQL 密码 | surveyking |
| **外部 MySQL** | | |
| EXTERNAL_MYSQL_HOST | 外部 MySQL 地址 | - |
| EXTERNAL_MYSQL_PORT | 外部 MySQL 端口 | 3306 |
| EXTERNAL_MYSQL_DB | 数据库名 | surveyking |
| EXTERNAL_MYSQL_USER | 用户名 | surveyking |
| EXTERNAL_MYSQL_PASSWORD | 密码 | - |

## 访问信息

- 地址：`http://<服务器IP>:<APP_PORT>`
- 默认账号：`admin` / `123456`
- **部署后请立即修改默认密码**

## 文件结构

```
deploy/
├── Dockerfile                      # 多阶段构建（Maven + JDK8）
├── docker-compose.yml              # 主编排文件（含内置 MySQL）
├── docker-compose.external-db.yml  # 外部 MySQL 覆盖文件
├── .env.test                       # 测试环境变量模板
├── .env.prod                       # 生产环境变量模板
└── 部署文档.md                      # 本文档
```

  └── master 分支    → 自动构建 → 手动触发部署生产环境

镜像仓库: 192.168.0.63:5000
  ├── surveyking:latest        (测试)
  └── surveyking-prod:latest   (生产)
```

## 环境说明

| 环境 | 触发分支 | 部署方式 | 服务器目录 | 应用端口 | MySQL 端口 |
|------|----------|----------|------------|----------|------------|
| 测试 | testserver | 自动 | /home/game/surveyking-test | 1991 | 13306 |
| 生产 | master | 手动 | /home/game/surveyking-prod | 1991 | 23306 |

## CI/CD 流程

### 测试环境
1. 推送代码到 `testserver` 分支
2. CI 自动构建 Docker 镜像并推送到 `192.168.0.63:5000/surveyking:latest`
3. CI 自动拉取镜像并通过 docker-compose 部署

### 生产环境
1. 推送代码到 `master` 分支
2. CI 自动构建 Docker 镜像并推送到 `192.168.0.63:5000/surveyking-prod:latest`
3. 同时打 commit SHA 标签：`surveyking-prod:<commit-sha>`（用于回滚）
4. **手动** 在 GitLab Pipeline 页面点击 deploy-prod 触发部署

## 首次部署

### 1. 准备服务器目录

```bash
# 测试环境
mkdir -p /home/game/surveyking-test/sqls

# 生产环境
mkdir -p /home/game/surveyking-prod/sqls
```

### 2. 复制配置文件

```bash
# 测试环境
cp deploy/docker-compose.yml /home/game/surveyking-test/
cp deploy/.env.test /home/game/surveyking-test/.env
cp server/rdbms/src/main/resources/scripts/init-mysql.sql /home/game/surveyking-test/sqls/

# 生产环境
cp deploy/docker-compose.yml /home/game/surveyking-prod/
cp deploy/.env.prod /home/game/surveyking-prod/.env
cp server/rdbms/src/main/resources/scripts/init-mysql.sql /home/game/surveyking-prod/sqls/
```

### 3. 修改密码（重要）

编辑 `.env` 文件，修改 `MYSQL_PASSWORD` 为强密码：
```bash
vi /home/game/surveyking-prod/.env
```

### 4. 启动服务

```bash
cd /home/game/surveyking-test  # 或 surveyking-prod
docker compose up -d
```

## 日常运维

### 查看服务状态
```bash
cd /home/game/surveyking-test  # 或 surveyking-prod
docker compose ps
```

### 查看日志
```bash
# 应用日志
docker compose logs -f app

# MySQL 日志
docker compose logs -f mysql

# 最近 100 行
docker compose logs --tail=100 app
```

### 重启服务
```bash
# 重启应用（不影响数据库）
docker compose restart app

# 重启全部
docker compose restart
```

### 回滚（生产环境）
```bash
cd /home/game/surveyking-prod

# 1. 修改 .env 中的 APP_IMAGE 为指定版本
#    APP_IMAGE=192.168.0.63:5000/surveyking-prod:<commit-sha>
vi .env

# 2. 重新部署
docker compose pull app
docker compose up -d
```

### 数据库备份
```bash
cd /home/game/surveyking-prod
MYSQL_PASSWORD=$(grep MYSQL_PASSWORD .env | cut -d'=' -f2)

# 备份
docker compose exec mysql mysqldump -u surveyking -p${MYSQL_PASSWORD} surveyking > backup_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).sql

# 恢复
docker compose exec -i mysql mysql -u surveyking -p${MYSQL_PASSWORD} surveyking < backup_20260409.sql
```

### 连接数据库
```bash
# 测试环境
mysql -h 127.0.0.1 -P 13306 -u surveyking -p surveyking

# 生产环境
mysql -h 127.0.0.1 -P 23306 -u surveyking -p surveyking
```

## 配置说明

### .env 环境变量

| 变量 | 说明 | 默认值 |
|------|------|--------|
| ENV | 环境标识（影响容器名后缀） | test |
| APP_PORT | 应用对外端口 | 1991 |
| MYSQL_PORT | MySQL 对外端口 | 3306 |
| MYSQL_PASSWORD | MySQL 密码 | surveyking |
| APP_IMAGE | 应用镜像地址 | 192.168.0.63:5000/surveyking:latest |
| AI_SILICONFLOW_TOKEN | AI 功能 Token | your_token |
| JAVA_OPTS | JVM 参数 | -Xms512m -Xmx1g |

## 访问信息

- 前端页面：`http://<服务器IP>:<APP_PORT>`
- 默认账号：`admin` / `123456`
- **部署后请立即修改默认密码**

新建/更新了 6 个文件：

| 文件 | 说明 |
|------|------|
| `deploy/Dockerfile` | 多阶段构建：Maven 3.8 + JDK 8 编译 → JDK 8 Alpine 运行 |
| `deploy/docker-compose.yml` | 主编排文件，默认内置 MySQL |
| `deploy/docker-compose.external-db.yml` | **新增** overlay 文件，用 `-f` 叠加即可切换到外部 MySQL |
| `deploy/.env.test` | 测试环境配置，内置/外部 MySQL 变量都有，外部的默认注释 |
| `deploy/.env.prod` | 生产环境配置，同上 |
| `.gitlab-ci.yml` | CI 部署阶段自动判断 `.env` 里有没有 `EXTERNAL_MYSQL_HOST`，自动选模式 |
| `deploy/部署文档.md` | 补充了两种数据库模式的完整文档 |

**切换方式超简单：** `.env` 里取消注释 `EXTERNAL_MYSQL_HOST` 那几行就是外部模式，注释掉就是内置模式，CI 自动识别。

file.content:
# ============ 阶段1: Maven 构建 ============
FROM maven:3.8-openjdk-8 AS builder

WORKDIR /build

# 先复制 pom.xml，利用 Docker 缓存层加速依赖下载
COPY server/pom.xml ./pom.xml
COPY server/shared/pom.xml ./shared/pom.xml
COPY server/rdbms/pom.xml ./rdbms/pom.xml
COPY server/ai/pom.xml ./ai/pom.xml
COPY server/api/pom.xml ./api/pom.xml

# 下载依赖（利用缓存，源码不变则不重复下载）
RUN mvn dependency:go-offline -B 2>/dev/null || true

# 复制全部源码
COPY server/ .

# 构建（跳过测试）
RUN mvn clean package -DskipTests -B

# ============ 阶段2: 运行环境 ============
FROM openjdk:8-jdk-alpine

LABEL maintainer="surveyking"

WORKDIR /app

# 从构建阶段复制 jar
COPY --from=builder /build/api/target/*.jar app.jar

# 复制初始化 SQL（供 docker-compose 挂载使用）
COPY server/rdbms/src/main/resources/scripts/init-mysql.sql /app/init-mysql.sql

# 创建数据目录
RUN mkdir -p /app/files /app/logs

VOLUME ["/app/files", "/app/logs"]

EXPOSE 1991

ENTRYPOINT ["sh", "-c", "java ${JAVA_OPTS} -jar /app/app.jar ${0} ${@}"]

file.content:
variables:
  REGISTRY: "192.168.0.63:5000"
  IMAGE_TEST: "${REGISTRY}/surveyking:latest"
  IMAGE_PROD: "${REGISTRY}/surveyking-prod:latest"
  DEPLOY_DIR_TEST: "/home/game/surveyking-test"
  DEPLOY_DIR_PROD: "/home/game/surveyking-prod"

stages:
  - check
  - build_push
  - deploy

before_script:
  - export SEMVER_BUILD=${CI_PIPELINE_ID}.${CI_COMMIT_SHA}
  - export SEMVER_FULL="${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}+${SEMVER_BUILD}"
  - echo "版本号 ${SEMVER_FULL}"

# ======================== Check ========================

echo-info:
  tags:
    - shell
  stage: check
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "testserver"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "master"
      when: manual
  script:
    - echo "分支 ${CI_COMMIT_BRANCH}"
    - echo "版本 ${SEMVER_FULL}"
    - echo "提交 ${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"

# ======================== 测试环境（testserver 分支） ========================

build-test:
  tags:
    - docker
  stage: build_push
  image: docker:27-cli
  only:
    refs:
      - testserver
    changes:
      - server/**/*
      - deploy/Dockerfile
  script:
    - docker build .
      -f ./deploy/Dockerfile
      --build-arg SEMVER_FULL=${SEMVER_FULL}
      -t ${IMAGE_TEST}
    - docker push ${IMAGE_TEST}
    - echo "${IMAGE_TEST} 构建推送成功"

deploy-test:
  tags:
    - shell
  stage: deploy
  only:
    refs:
      - testserver
    changes:
      - server/**/*
      - deploy/**/*
  script:
    - echo "部署测试环境..."
    - mkdir -p ${DEPLOY_DIR_TEST}/sqls
    # 复制部署文件
    - cp deploy/docker-compose.yml ${DEPLOY_DIR_TEST}/docker-compose.yml
    - cp deploy/docker-compose.external-db.yml ${DEPLOY_DIR_TEST}/docker-compose.external-db.yml
    - cp deploy/.env.test ${DEPLOY_DIR_TEST}/.env
    - cp server/rdbms/src/main/resources/scripts/init-mysql.sql ${DEPLOY_DIR_TEST}/sqls/init-mysql.sql
    - cd ${DEPLOY_DIR_TEST}
    # 根据 .env 判断使用内置还是外部 MySQL
    - |
      if grep -q "^EXTERNAL_MYSQL_HOST=" .env && grep "^EXTERNAL_MYSQL_HOST=" .env | grep -vq "^#"; then
        echo "检测到外部 MySQL 配置，使用外部数据库模式"
        docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.external-db.yml pull app
        docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.external-db.yml up -d
      else
        echo "使用内置 MySQL 模式"
        docker compose pull app
        docker compose up -d
      fi
    - echo "测试环境部署完成"
    - echo "访问地址 http://$(hostname -I | awk '{print $1}'):$(grep APP_PORT .env | cut -d= -f2)"

# ======================== 生产环境（master 分支） ========================

build-prod:
  tags:
    - docker
  stage: build_push
  image: docker:27-cli
  only:
    refs:
      - master
    changes:
      - server/**/*
      - deploy/Dockerfile
  script:
    - docker build .
      -f ./deploy/Dockerfile
      --build-arg SEMVER_FULL=${SEMVER_FULL}
      -t ${IMAGE_PROD}
    - docker tag ${IMAGE_PROD} ${REGISTRY}/surveyking-prod:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
    - docker push ${IMAGE_PROD}
    - docker push ${REGISTRY}/surveyking-prod:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
    - echo "${IMAGE_PROD} 构建推送成功（tag: ${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}）"

deploy-prod:
  tags:
    - shell
  stage: deploy
  only:
    refs:
      - master
  when: manual
  script:
    - echo "部署生产环境（手动触发）..."
    - mkdir -p ${DEPLOY_DIR_PROD}/sqls
    # 复制部署文件
    - cp deploy/docker-compose.yml ${DEPLOY_DIR_PROD}/docker-compose.yml
    - cp deploy/docker-compose.external-db.yml ${DEPLOY_DIR_PROD}/docker-compose.external-db.yml

file.content:
version: "3.8"

services:
  mysql:
    image: mysql:8.0
    container_name: surveyking-mysql-${ENV:-test}
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: ${MYSQL_PASSWORD:-surveyking}
      MYSQL_DATABASE: surveyking
      MYSQL_USER: surveyking
      MYSQL_PASSWORD: ${MYSQL_PASSWORD:-surveyking}
    volumes:
      - mysql_data:/var/lib/mysql
      - ./sqls:/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d:ro
    ports:
      - "${MYSQL_PORT:-3306}:3306"
    networks:
      - surveyking-net
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "mysqladmin", "ping", "-h", "localhost"]
      timeout: 20s
      retries: 10
      start_period: 40s
      interval: 30s
    command: >
      --character-set-server=utf8mb4
      --collation-server=utf8mb4_unicode_ci
      --default-time-zone=+08:00
      --log-bin-trust-function-creators=1

  app:
    image: ${APP_IMAGE:-192.168.0.63:5000/surveyking:latest}
    container_name: surveyking-app-${ENV:-test}
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE: pro
      SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL: jdbc:mysql://mysql:3306/surveyking?rewriteBatchedStatements=true&useUnicode=true&characterEncoding=UTF-8&useSSL=false&allowPublicKeyRetrieval=true&serverTimezone=Asia/Shanghai
      SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME: surveyking
      SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD: ${MYSQL_PASSWORD:-surveyking}
      SPRING_DATASOURCE_DRIVER_CLASS_NAME: com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver
      AI_SILICONFLOW_TOKEN: ${AI_SILICONFLOW_TOKEN:-your_token}
      TZ: Asia/Shanghai
      JAVA_OPTS: "${JAVA_OPTS:--Xms512m -Xmx1g -Dfile.encoding=UTF-8}"
    volumes:
      - app_files:/app/files
      - app_logs:/app/logs
    depends_on:
      mysql:
        condition: service_healthy
    ports:
      - "${APP_PORT:-1991}:1991"
    networks:
      - surveyking-net
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "wget -qO- http://localhost:1991/api/public/project/list?pageNo=1&pageSize=1 || exit 1"]
      timeout: 30s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 60s
      interval: 30s

networks:
  surveyking-net:
    driver: bridge

volumes:
  mysql_data:
  app_files:
  app_logs:

variables:
  REGISTRY: "192.168.0.63:5000"
  IMAGE_TEST: "${REGISTRY}/surveyking:latest"
  IMAGE_PROD: "${REGISTRY}/surveyking-prod:latest"
  DEPLOY_DIR_TEST: "/home/game/surveyking-test"
  DEPLOY_DIR_PROD: "/home/game/surveyking-prod"

stages:
  - check
  - build_push
  - deploy

before_script:
  - export SEMVER_BUILD=${CI_PIPELINE_ID}.${CI_COMMIT_SHA}
  - export SEMVER_FULL="${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}+${SEMVER_BUILD}"
  - echo "版本号 ${SEMVER_FULL}"

# ======================== Check ========================

echo-info:
  tags:
    - shell
  stage: check
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "testserver"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "master"
      when: manual
  script:
    - echo "分支 ${CI_COMMIT_BRANCH}"
    - echo "版本 ${SEMVER_FULL}"
    - echo "提交 ${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"

# ======================== 测试环境（testserver 分支） ========================

build-test:
  tags:
    - docker
  stage: build_push
  image: docker:27-cli
  only:
    refs:
      - testserver
    changes:
      - server/**/*
      - deploy/Dockerfile
  script:
    - docker build .
      -f ./deploy/Dockerfile
      --build-arg SEMVER_FULL=${SEMVER_FULL}
      -t ${IMAGE_TEST}
    - docker push ${IMAGE_TEST}
    - echo "${IMAGE_TEST} 构建推送成功"

deploy-test:
  tags:
    - shell
  stage: deploy
  only:
    refs:
      - testserver
    changes:
      - server/**/*
      - deploy/**/*
  script:
    - echo "部署测试环境..."
    - mkdir -p ${DEPLOY_DIR_TEST}/sqls
    # 复制部署文件
    - cp deploy/docker-compose.yml ${DEPLOY_DIR_TEST}/docker-compose.yml
    - cp deploy/docker-compose.external-db.yml ${DEPLOY_DIR_TEST}/docker-compose.external-db.yml
    - cp deploy/.env.test ${DEPLOY_DIR_TEST}/.env
    - cp server/rdbms/src/main/resources/scripts/init-mysql.sql ${DEPLOY_DIR_TEST}/sqls/init-mysql.sql
    - cd ${DEPLOY_DIR_TEST}
    # 根据 .env 判断使用内置还是外部 MySQL
    - |
      if grep -q "^EXTERNAL_MYSQL_HOST=" .env && grep "^EXTERNAL_MYSQL_HOST=" .env | grep -vq "^#"; then
        echo "检测到外部 MySQL 配置，使用外部数据库模式"
        docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.external-db.yml pull app
        docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.external-db.yml up -d
      else
        echo "使用内置 MySQL 模式"
        docker compose pull app
        docker compose up -d
      fi
    - echo "测试环境部署完成"
    - echo "访问地址 http://$(hostname -I | awk '{print $1}'):$(grep APP_PORT .env | cut -d= -f2)"

# ======================== 生产环境（master 分支） ========================

build-prod:
  tags:
    - docker
  stage: build_push
  image: docker:27-cli
  only:
    refs:
      - master
    changes:
      - server/**/*
      - deploy/Dockerfile
  script:
    - docker build .
      -f ./deploy/Dockerfile
      --build-arg SEMVER_FULL=${SEMVER_FULL}
      -t ${IMAGE_PROD}
    - docker tag ${IMAGE_PROD} ${REGISTRY}/surveyking-prod:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
    - docker push ${IMAGE_PROD}
    - docker push ${REGISTRY}/surveyking-prod:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
    - echo "${IMAGE_PROD} 构建推送成功（tag: ${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}）"

deploy-prod:
  tags:
    - shell
  stage: deploy
  only:
    refs:
      - master
  when: manual
  script:
    - echo "部署生产环境（手动触发）..."
    - mkdir -p ${DEPLOY_DIR_PROD}/sqls
    # 复制部署文件
    - cp deploy/docker-compose.yml ${DEPLOY_DIR_PROD}/docker-compose.yml
    - cp deploy/docker-compose.external-db.yml ${DEPLOY_DIR_PROD}/docker-compose.external-db.yml
    - cp deploy/.env.prod ${DEPLOY_DIR_PROD}/.env
    - cp server/rdbms/src/main/resources/scripts/init-mysql.sql ${DEPLOY_DIR_PROD}/sqls/init-mysql.sql
    - cd ${DEPLOY_DIR_PROD}
    # 根据 .env 判断使用内置还是外部 MySQL
    - |
      if grep -q "^EXTERNAL_MYSQL_HOST=" .env && grep "^EXTERNAL_MYSQL_HOST=" .env | grep -vq "^#"; then
        echo "检测到外部 MySQL 配置，使用外部数据库模式"
        docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.external-db.yml pull app
        docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.external-db.yml up -d
      else
        echo "使用内置 MySQL 模式"
        docker compose pull app
        docker compose up -d
      fi
    - echo "生产环境部署完成"
    - echo "访问地址 http://$(hostname -I | awk '{print $1}'):$(grep APP_PORT .env | cut -d= -f2)"

        docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.external-db.yml pull app
        docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.external-db.yml up -d
      else
        echo "使用内置 MySQL 模式"
        docker compose pull app
        docker compose up -d
      fi
    - echo "测试环境部署完成"
    - echo "访问地址 http://$(hostname -I | awk '{print $1}'):$(grep APP_PORT .env | cut -d= -f2)"

# ======================== 生产环境（master 分支） ========================

build-prod:
  tags:
    - docker
  stage: build_push
  image: docker:27-cli
  only:
    refs:
      - master
    changes:
      - server/**/*
      - deploy/Dockerfile
  script:
    - docker build .
      -f ./deploy/Dockerfile
      --build-arg SEMVER_FULL=${SEMVER_FULL}
      -t ${IMAGE_PROD}
    - docker tag ${IMAGE_PROD} ${REGISTRY}/surveyking-prod:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
    - docker push ${IMAGE_PROD}
    - docker push ${REGISTRY}/surveyking-prod:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
    - echo "${IMAGE_PROD} 构建推送成功（tag: ${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}）"

deploy-prod:
  tags:
    - shell
  stage: deploy
  only:
    refs:
      - master
  when: manual
  script:
    - echo "部署生产环境（手动触发）..."
    - mkdir -p ${DEPLOY_DIR_PROD}/sqls
    # 复制部署文件
    - cp deploy/docker-compose.yml ${DEPLOY_DIR_PROD}/docker-compose.yml
    - cp deploy/docker-compose.external-db.yml ${DEPLOY_DIR_PROD}/docker-compose.external-db.yml
    - cp deploy/.env.prod ${DEPLOY_DIR_PROD}/.env
    - cp server/rdbms/src/main/resources/scripts/init-mysql.sql ${DEPLOY_DIR_PROD}/sqls/init-mysql.sql
    - cd ${DEPLOY_DIR_PROD}
    # 根据 .env 判断使用内置还是外部 MySQL
    - |
      if grep -q "^EXTERNAL_MYSQL_HOST=" .env && grep "^EXTERNAL_MYSQL_HOST=" .env | grep -vq "^#"; then
        echo "检测到外部 MySQL 配置，使用外部数据库模式"
        docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.external-db.yml pull app
        docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.external-db.yml up -d
      else
        echo "使用内置 MySQL 模式"
        docker compose pull app
        docker compose up -d
      fi
    - echo "生产环境部署完成"
    - echo "访问地址 http://$(hostname -I | awk '{print $1}'):$(grep APP_PORT .env | cut -d= -f2)"

toolUseResult.originalFile:
# ============ 阶段1: Maven 构建 ============
FROM maven:3.8-openjdk-8 AS builder

WORKDIR /build

# 先复制 pom.xml，利用 Docker 缓存层加速依赖下载
COPY server/pom.xml ./pom.xml
COPY server/shared/pom.xml ./shared/pom.xml
COPY server/rdbms/pom.xml ./rdbms/pom.xml
COPY server/ai/pom.xml ./ai/pom.xml
COPY server/api/pom.xml ./api/pom.xml

# 下载依赖（利用缓存，源码不变则不重复下载）
RUN mvn dependency:go-offline -B 2>/dev/null || true

# 复制全部源码
COPY server/ .

# 构建（跳过测试）
RUN mvn clean package -DskipTests -B

# ============ 阶段2: 运行环境 ============
FROM openjdk:8-jdk-alpine

LABEL maintainer="surveyking"

WORKDIR /app

# 从构建阶段复制 jar
COPY --from=builder /build/api/target/*.jar app.jar

# 复制初始化 SQL（供 docker-compose 挂载使用）
COPY server/rdbms/src/main/resources/scripts/init-mysql.sql /app/init-mysql.sql

# 创建数据目录
RUN mkdir -p /app/files /app/logs

VOLUME ["/app/files", "/app/logs"]

EXPOSE 1991

ENTRYPOINT ["sh", "-c", "java ${JAVA_OPTS} -jar /app/app.jar ${0} ${@}"]

input.content:
# SurveyKing 部署文档

## 架构概览

```
GitLab CI/CD
  ├── testserver 分支 → 自动构建 → 自动部署测试环境
  └── master 分支    → 自动构建 → 手动触发部署生产环境

镜像仓库: 192.168.0.63:5000
  ├── surveyking:latest        (测试)
  └── surveyking-prod:latest   (生产)

数据库模式:
  ├── 模式一: Docker 内置 MySQL（默认）
  └── 模式二: 外部已有 MySQL
```

## 环境说明

| 环境 | 触发分支 | 部署方式 | 服务器目录 | 应用端口 |
|------|----------|----------|------------|----------|
| 测试 | testserver | 自动 | /home/game/surveyking-test | 1991 |
| 生产 | master | 手动 | /home/game/surveyking-prod | 1991 |

## 项目根目录文件结构

```
survey-king/
├── .gitlab-ci.yml                  # CI/CD 流水线
├── Dockerfile                      # 多阶段构建（Maven + JDK8）
├── docker-compose.yml              # 主编排文件（含内置 MySQL）
├── docker-compose.external-db.yml  # 外部 MySQL 覆盖文件
├── .env.test                       # 测试环境变量模板
├── .env.prod                       # 生产环境变量模板
└── deploy/
    ├── 部署文档.md                  # 本文档
    ├── 官方-docker-compose.txt     # 官方参考
    └── 官方-setup.sh              # 官方参考
```

## 数据库模式

### 模式一：内置 MySQL（默认）

应用和 MySQL 都运行在 Docker 容器中，开箱即用。

```bash
docker compose up -d
```

### 模式二：外部已有 MySQL

只启动应用容器，连接外部 MySQL。

**步骤：**

1. 编辑 `.env`，取消注释外部 MySQL 配置：
```env
EXTERNAL_MYSQL_HOST=192.168.0.100
EXTERNAL_MYSQL_PORT=3306
EXTERNAL_MYSQL_DB=surveyking
EXTERNAL_MYSQL_USER=surveyking
EXTERNAL_MYSQL_PASSWORD=your_password
```

2. 在外部 MySQL 上执行初始化 SQL：
```bash
mysql -h 192.168.0.100 -u surveyking -p surveyking < sqls/init-mysql.sql
```

3. 使用 overlay 启动：
```bash
docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.external-db.yml up -d
```

> CI/CD 会自动判断 `.env` 中是否有未注释的 `EXTERNAL_MYSQL_HOST`，自动选择对应模式。

## CI/CD 流程

### 测试环境
1. 推送代码到 `testserver` 分支
2. CI 自动构建 Docker 镜像推送到 `192.168.0.63:5000/surveyking:latest`
3. CI 自动部署（根据 `.env` 判断数据库模式）

### 生产环境
1. 推送代码到 `master` 分支
2. CI 自动构建镜像推送到 `192.168.0.63:5000/surveyking-prod:latest`
3. 同时打 commit SHA 标签（用于回滚）
4. **手动** 在 GitLab Pipeline 页面点击 deploy-prod 触发部署

## 首次部署

### 1. 准备目录

```bash
mkdir -p /home/game/surveyking-test/sqls
mkdir -p /home/game/surveyking-prod/sqls
```

### 2. 复制配置

```bash
# 测试环境
cp docker-compose.yml /home/game/surveyking-test/
cp docker-compose.external-db.yml /home/game/surveyking-test/
cp .env.test /home/game/surveyking-test/.env
cp server/rdbms/src/main/resources/scripts/init-mysql.sql /home/game/surveyking-test/sqls/

# 生产环境
cp docker-compose.yml /home/game/surveyking-prod/
cp docker-compose.external-db.yml /home/game/surveyking-prod/
cp .env.prod /home/game/surveyking-prod/.env
cp server/rdbms/src/main/resources/scripts/init-mysql.sql /home/game/surveyking-prod/sqls/
```

### 3. 修改密码（重要）

```bash
vi /home/game/surveyking-prod/.env
# 修改 MYSQL_PASSWORD 或 EXTERNAL_MYSQL_PASSWORD 为强密码
```

### 4. 启动

```bash
cd /home/game/surveyking-test  # 或 surveyking-prod

# 内置 MySQL 模式
docker compose up -d

# 外部 MySQL 模式
docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.external-db.yml up -d
```

## 日常运维

### 查看状态
```bash
docker compose ps
```

### 查看日志
```bash
docker compose logs -f app          # 应用日志
docker compose logs -f mysql        # MySQL 日志（内置模式）
docker compose logs --tail=100 app  # 最近 100 行
```

### 重启
```bash
docker compose restart app   # 只重启应用
docker compose restart       # 全部重启
```

### 回滚（生产环境）
```bash
cd /home/game/surveyking-prod

# 修改 .env 中 APP_IMAGE 为指定版本
# APP_IMAGE=192.168.0.63:5000/surveyking-prod:<commit-sha>
vi .env

docker compose pull app
docker compose up -d
```

### 数据库备份（内置 MySQL 模式）
```bash
cd /home/game/surveyking-prod
MYSQL_PASSWORD=$(grep "^MYSQL_PASSWORD=" .env | cut -d'=' -f2)

# 备份
docker compose exec mysql mysqldump -u surveyking -p${MYSQL_PASSWORD} surveyking > backup_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).sql

# 恢复
docker compose exec -i mysql mysql -u surveyking -p${MYSQL_PASSWORD} surveyking < backup.sql
```

## .env 配置参考

| 变量 | 说明 | 默认值 |
|------|------|--------|
| ENV | 环境标识（容器名后缀） | test |
| APP_PORT | 应用端口 | 1991 |
| APP_IMAGE | 应用镜像 | 192.168.0.63:5000/surveyking:latest |
| JAVA_OPTS | JVM 参数 | -Xms512m -Xmx1g |
| AI_SILICONFLOW_TOKEN | AI Token | your_token |
| **内置 MySQL** | | |
| MYSQL_PORT | MySQL 对外端口 | 3306 |
| MYSQL_PASSWORD | MySQL 密码 | surveyking |
| **外部 MySQL** | | |
| EXTERNAL_MYSQL_HOST | 外部 MySQL 地址 | - |
| EXTERNAL_MYSQL_PORT | 外部 MySQL 端口 | 3306 |
| EXTERNAL_MYSQL_DB | 数据库名 | surveyking |
| EXTERNAL_MYSQL_USER | 用户名 | surveyking |
| EXTERNAL_MYSQL_PASSWORD | 密码 | - |

## 访问信息

- 地址：`http://<服务器IP>:<APP_PORT>`
- 默认账号：`admin` / `123456`
- **部署后请立即修改默认密码**

4. **手动** 在 GitLab Pipeline 页面点击 deploy-prod 触发部署

## 首次部署

### 1. 准备目录

```bash
# 测试环境
mkdir -p /home/game/surveyking-test/sqls

# 生产环境
mkdir -p /home/game/surveyking-prod/sqls
```

### 2. 复制配置

```bash
# 测试环境
cp deploy/docker-compose.yml /home/game/surveyking-test/
cp deploy/docker-compose.external-db.yml /home/game/surveyking-test/
cp deploy/.env.test /home/game/surveyking-test/.env
cp server/rdbms/src/main/resources/scripts/init-mysql.sql /home/game/surveyking-test/sqls/

# 生产环境
cp deploy/docker-compose.yml /home/game/surveyking-prod/
cp deploy/docker-compose.external-db.yml /home/game/surveyking-prod/
cp deploy/.env.prod /home/game/surveyking-prod/.env
cp server/rdbms/src/main/resources/scripts/init-mysql.sql /home/game/surveyking-prod/sqls/
```

### 3. 修改密码（重要）

```bash
vi /home/game/surveyking-prod/.env
# 修改 MYSQL_PASSWORD 或 EXTERNAL_MYSQL_PASSWORD 为强密码
```

### 4. 启动

```bash
cd /home/game/surveyking-test  # 或 surveyking-prod

# 内置 MySQL 模式
docker compose up -d

# 外部 MySQL 模式
docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.external-db.yml up -d
```

## 日常运维

### 查看状态
```bash
docker compose ps
```

### 查看日志
```bash
docker compose logs -f app          # 应用日志
docker compose logs -f mysql        # MySQL 日志（内置模式）
docker compose logs --tail=100 app  # 最近 100 行
```

### 重启
```bash
docker compose restart app   # 只重启应用
docker compose restart       # 全部重启
```

### 回滚（生产环境）
```bash
cd /home/game/surveyking-prod

# 修改 .env 中 APP_IMAGE 为指定版本
# APP_IMAGE=192.168.0.63:5000/surveyking-prod:<commit-sha>
vi .env

# 重新部署
docker compose pull app
docker compose up -d
```

### 数据库备份（内置 MySQL 模式）
```bash
cd /home/game/surveyking-prod
MYSQL_PASSWORD=$(grep "^MYSQL_PASSWORD=" .env | cut -d'=' -f2)

# 备份
docker compose exec mysql mysqldump -u surveyking -p${MYSQL_PASSWORD} surveyking > backup_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).sql

# 恢复
docker compose exec -i mysql mysql -u surveyking -p${MYSQL_PASSWORD} surveyking < backup.sql
```

## .env 配置参考

| 变量 | 说明 | 默认值 |
|------|------|--------|
| ENV | 环境标识（容器名后缀） | test |
| APP_PORT | 应用端口 | 1991 |
| APP_IMAGE | 应用镜像 | 192.168.0.63:5000/surveyking:latest |
| JAVA_OPTS | JVM 参数 | -Xms512m -Xmx1g |
| AI_SILICONFLOW_TOKEN | AI Token | your_token |
| **内置 MySQL** | | |
| MYSQL_PORT | MySQL 对外端口 | 3306 |
| MYSQL_PASSWORD | MySQL 密码 | surveyking |
| **外部 MySQL** | | |
| EXTERNAL_MYSQL_HOST | 外部 MySQL 地址 | - |
| EXTERNAL_MYSQL_PORT | 外部 MySQL 端口 | 3306 |
| EXTERNAL_MYSQL_DB | 数据库名 | surveyking |
| EXTERNAL_MYSQL_USER | 用户名 | surveyking |
| EXTERNAL_MYSQL_PASSWORD | 密码 | - |

## 访问信息

- 地址：`http://<服务器IP>:<APP_PORT>`
- 默认账号：`admin` / `123456`
- **部署后请立即修改默认密码**

## 文件结构

```
deploy/
├── Dockerfile                      # 多阶段构建（Maven + JDK8）
├── docker-compose.yml              # 主编排文件（含内置 MySQL）
├── docker-compose.external-db.yml  # 外部 MySQL 覆盖文件
├── .env.test                       # 测试环境变量模板
├── .env.prod                       # 生产环境变量模板
└── 部署文档.md                      # 本文档
```

file.content:
# ============ 阶段1: Maven 构建 ============
FROM maven:3.8-openjdk-8 AS builder

WORKDIR /build

# 先复制 pom.xml，利用 Docker 缓存层加速依赖下载
COPY server/pom.xml ./pom.xml
COPY server/shared/pom.xml ./shared/pom.xml
COPY server/rdbms/pom.xml ./rdbms/pom.xml
COPY server/ai/pom.xml ./ai/pom.xml
COPY server/api/pom.xml ./api/pom.xml

# 下载依赖（利用缓存，源码不变则不重复下载）
RUN mvn dependency:go-offline -B 2>/dev/null || true

# 复制全部源码
COPY server/ .

# 构建（跳过测试）
RUN mvn clean package -DskipTests -B

# ============ 阶段2: 运行环境 ============
FROM openjdk:8-jdk-alpine

LABEL maintainer="surveyking"

WORKDIR /app

# 从构建阶段复制 jar
COPY --from=builder /build/api/target/*.jar app.jar

# 创建数据目录
RUN mkdir -p /app/files /app/logs

VOLUME ["/app/files", "/app/logs"]

EXPOSE 1991

ENTRYPOINT ["sh", "-c", "java ${JAVA_OPTS} -jar /app/app.jar ${0} ${@}"]

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0"
    xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 https://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd">
    <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
    <packaging>pom</packaging>
    <modules>
        <module>api</module>
        <module>shared</module>
        <module>rdbms</module>
        <module>ai</module>
        <!--        <module>flow</module>-->
    </modules>
    <parent>
        <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
        <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-parent</artifactId>
        <version>2.7.7</version>
        <relativePath/>
        <!-- lookup parent from repository -->
    </parent>
    <groupId>cn.surveyking</groupId>
    <artifactId>survey-server</artifactId>
    <version>${revision}</version>
    <name>survey-server</name>
    <description>Make a better open source survey system.</description>

    <properties>
        <java.version>1.8</java.version>
        <revision>v1.9.0</revision>
        <org.mapstruct.version>1.4.2.Final</org.mapstruct.version>
        <org.projectlombok.version>1.18.16</org.projectlombok.version>
    </properties>

    <dependencyManagement>
        <dependencies>
            <dependency>
                <groupId>org.apache.commons</groupId>
                <artifactId>commons-lang3</artifactId>
                <version>3.0</version>
            </dependency>
            <!--滑动验证码-->
            <dependency>
                <groupId>com.anji-plus</groupId>
                <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-captcha</artifactId>
                <version>1.3.0</version>
            </dependency>
            <dependency>
                <groupId>org.dhatim</groupId>
                <artifactId>fastexcel</artifactId>
                <version>0.12.13</version>
            </dependency>
            <dependency>
                <groupId>org.dhatim</groupId>
                <artifactId>fastexcel-reader</artifactId>
                <version>0.12.3</version>
            </dependency>
            <dependency>
                <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId>
                <artifactId>jjwt-api</artifactId>
                <version>0.11.2</version>
            </dependency>
            <dependency>
                <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId>
                <artifactId>jjwt-jackson</artifactId>
                <version>0.11.2</version>
            </dependency>
            <dependency>
                <groupId>net.coobird</groupId>
                <artifactId>thumbnailator</artifactId>
                <version>0.4.14</version>
            </dependency>
            <dependency>
                <groupId>com.github.ben-manes.caffeine</groupId>
                <artifactId>caffeine</artifactId>
                <version>2.9.2</version>
            </dependency>
            <dependency>
                <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId>
                <artifactId>jjwt-impl</artifactId>
                <version>0.11.2</version>
            </dependency>

            <dependency>
                <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId>
                <artifactId>lombok</artifactId>
                <version>1.16.18</version>
                <scope>provided</scope>
            </dependency>

            <dependency>
                <groupId>com.baomidou</groupId>
                <artifactId>mybatis-plus-boot-starter</artifactId>
                <version>3.5.0</version>
            </dependency>

            <dependency>
                <groupId>com.google.zxing</groupId>
                <artifactId>javase</artifactId>
                <version>3.5.0</version>
            </dependency>

            <dependency>
                <groupId>com.belerweb</groupId>
                <artifactId>pinyin4j</artifactId>
                <version>2.5.0</version>
            </dependency>

            <dependency>
                <groupId>org.mapstruct</groupId>
                <artifactId>mapstruct</artifactId>
                <version>${org.mapstruct.version}</version>
            </dependency>
        </dependencies>
    </dependencyManagement>

    <build>
        <plugins>
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>3.8.1</version>
                <configuration>
                    <source>1.8</source>
                    <target>1.8</target>
                    <annotationProcessorPaths>
                        <path>
                            <groupId>org.mapstruct</groupId>
                            <artifactId>mapstruct-processor</artifactId>
                            <version>${org.mapstruct.version}</version>
                        </path>
                        <path>
                            <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId>
                            <artifactId>lombok</artifactId>
                            <version>${org.projectlombok.version}</version>
                        </path>

                        <!-- additional annotation processor required as of Lombok 1.18.16 -->
                        <path>
                            <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId>
                            <artifactId>lombok-mapstruct-binding</artifactId>
                            <version>0.2.0</version>
                        </path>
                    </annotationProcessorPaths>

                    <compilerArgs>
                        <arg> -Amapstruct.suppressGeneratorTimestamp=true
                        </arg>
                        <arg> -Amapstruct.suppressGeneratorVersionInfoComment=true
                        </arg>
                        <arg> -Amapstruct.verbose=true
                        </arg>
                        <arg> -Amapstruct.defaultComponentModel=spring
                        </arg>
                        <arg> -Amapstruct.unmappedTargetPolicy=IGNORE
                        </arg>
                    </compilerArgs>
                </configuration>
            </plugin>
        </plugins>
    </build>
</project>

file.content:
version: 1.10.0
spring:
  application:
    name: survey
  profiles:
    active: @activeProfile@ # maven 配置
#    active: ${activeProfile} # gradle 配置
  mvc:
    async:
      request-timeout: -1
    static-path-pattern: /notfound # 覆盖默认的 /**
    throw-exception-if-no-handler-found: true
    pathmatch:
      matching-strategy: ant_path_matcher
  servlet:
    multipart:
      max-file-size: 2048MB
      max-request-size: 2048MB
  jackson:
    default-property-inclusion: non_null # 序列化忽略空值
    date-format: yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss
    time-zone: GMT+8
    serialization:
      FAIL_ON_EMPTY_BEANS: false
    deserialization:
      FAIL_ON_UNKNOWN_PROPERTIES: false # 反序列化时允许未知属性
sk:
  security:
    url-token-authentication:
      enabled: true # 默认开启 url token 认证
flowable:
  async-executor-activate: false
  database-schema-update: false

aj:
  captcha:
    jigsaw: classpath:images/jigsaw # 滑动验证，底图路径，不配置将使用默认图片；以 classpath: 开头，取 resource 目录下路径
    pic-click: classpath:images/pic-click # 滑动验证，底图路径，不配置将使用默认图片；以 classpath: 开头，取 resource 目录下路径
    cache-type: local # 缓存 local/redis...
    cache-number: 1000 # local 缓存的阈值,达到这个值，清除缓存
    timing-clear: 180 # local定时清除过期缓存(单位秒),设置为0代表不执行
    type: blockPuzzle # 验证码类型 default两种都实例化。 blockPuzzle 滑块拼图 clickWord 文字点选
    water-mark: survey # 右下角水印文字(我的水印)，可使用 https://tool.chinaz.com/tools/unicode.aspx 中文转 Unicode，Linux 可能需要转 unicode
    interference-options: 2 # 滑动干扰项(0/1/2)
    req-frequency-limit-enable: false # 接口请求次数一分钟限制是否开启 true|false
    req-get-lock-limit: 5 # 验证失败5次，get接口锁定
    req-get-lock-seconds: 10 # 验证失败后，锁定时间间隔
    req-get-minute-limit: 30 # get 接口一分钟内请求数限制
    req-check-minute-limit: 60 # check 接口一分钟内请求数限制
    req-verify-minute-limit: 60 # verify 接口一分钟内请求数限制

api:
  prefix: /api

surveyking:
  ai:
    siliconflow:
      enabled: true
      base-url: https://api.siliconflow.cn
      token: ${AI_SILICONFLOW_TOKEN:your_token}
      model-id: deepseek-chat
      model-types:
        - display-name: "DeepSeek Chat"
          value: "deepseek-chat"
          description: "DeepSeek 对话模型"
        - display-name: "Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct"
          value: "Qwen/Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct"
          description: "Qwen2.5 72B 指令模型"
        - display-name: "Llama-3.1-70B-Instruct"
          value: "meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3.1-70B-Instruct"
          description: "Llama 3.1 70B 指令模型"

    db-config:

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0"
         xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
         xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd">
    <parent>
        <artifactId>survey-server</artifactId>
        <groupId>cn.surveyking</groupId>
        <version>${revision}</version>
    </parent>
    <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
    <artifactId>api</artifactId>
    <packaging>jar</packaging>

    <properties>
    </properties>

    <dependencies>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>cn.surveyking</groupId>
            <artifactId>shared</artifactId>
            <version>${revision}</version>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>cn.surveyking</groupId>
            <artifactId>rdbms</artifactId>
            <version>${revision}</version>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>cn.surveyking</groupId>
            <artifactId>ai</artifactId>
            <version>${revision}</version>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId>
            <artifactId>lombok</artifactId>
            <scope>provided</scope>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-test</artifactId>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>
    </dependencies>

    <build>
        <finalName>surveyking-${revision}</finalName>
        <plugins>
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
                <artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId>
                <configuration>
                    <executable>true</executable>
                </configuration>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>repackage</goal>
                        </goals>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
            </plugin>
        </plugins>
    </build>
    
    <profiles>
        <profile>
            <id>dev</id>
            <properties>
                <activeProfile>dev</activeProfile>
            </properties>
            <activation>
                <activeByDefault>true</activeByDefault>
            </activation>
        </profile>
        <profile>
            <id>pro</id>
            <properties>
                <activeProfile>pro</activeProfile>
            </properties>
        </profile>
    </profiles>
</project>

file.content:
version: "3.8"

services:
  mysql:
    image: mysql:8.0
    container_name: surveyking-mysql-${ENV:-test}
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: ${MYSQL_PASSWORD:-surveyking}
      MYSQL_DATABASE: surveyking
      MYSQL_USER: surveyking
      MYSQL_PASSWORD: ${MYSQL_PASSWORD:-surveyking}
    volumes:
      - mysql_data:/var/lib/mysql
      - ./sqls:/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d:ro
    ports:
      - "${MYSQL_PORT:-3306}:3306"
    networks:
      - surveyking-net
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "mysqladmin", "ping", "-h", "localhost"]
      timeout: 20s
      retries: 10
      start_period: 40s
      interval: 30s
    command: >
      --character-set-server=utf8mb4
      --collation-server=utf8mb4_unicode_ci
      --default-time-zone=+08:00
      --log-bin-trust-function-creators=1

  app:
    image: ${APP_IMAGE:-192.168.0.63:5000/surveyking:latest}
    container_name: surveyking-app-${ENV:-test}
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE: pro
      SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL: jdbc:mysql://mysql:3306/surveyking?rewriteBatchedStatements=true&useUnicode=true&characterEncoding=UTF-8&useSSL=false&allowPublicKeyRetrieval=true&serverTimezone=Asia/Shanghai
      SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME: surveyking
      SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD: ${MYSQL_PASSWORD:-surveyking}
      SPRING_DATASOURCE_DRIVER_CLASS_NAME: com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver
      AI_SILICONFLOW_TOKEN: ${AI_SILICONFLOW_TOKEN:-your_token}
      TZ: Asia/Shanghai
      JAVA_OPTS: "${JAVA_OPTS:--Xms512m -Xmx1g -Dfile.encoding=UTF-8}"
    volumes:
      - app_files:/app/files
      - app_logs:/app/logs
    depends_on:
      mysql:
        condition: service_healthy
    ports:
      - "${APP_PORT:-1991}:1991"
    networks:
      - surveyking-net
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "wget -qO- http://localhost:1991/api/public/project/list?pageNo=1&pageSize=1 || exit 1"]
      timeout: 30s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 60s
      interval: 30s

networks:
  surveyking-net:
    driver: bridge

volumes:
  mysql_data:
  app_files:
  app_logs:

content.content:
1→# ========================================================
     2→# 外部 MySQL 覆盖文件
     3→# 用法: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.external-db.yml up -d
     4→#
     5→# 此文件会：
     6→#   1. 移除内置 mysql 服务
     7→#   2. 让 app 直连外部 MySQL（通过 .env 中的变量配置）
     8→# ========================================================
     9→
    10→services:
    11→  # 禁用内置 mysql
    12→  mysql:
    13→    profiles:
    14→      - disabled
    15→
    16→  app:
    17→    depends_on: {}

    19→      SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE: pro

file.content:
# ========================================================
# 外部 MySQL 覆盖文件
# 用法: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.external-db.yml up -d
#
# 此文件会：
#   1. 移除内置 mysql 服务
#   2. 让 app 直连外部 MySQL（通过 .env 中的变量配置）
# ========================================================

services:
  # 禁用内置 mysql
  mysql:
    profiles:
      - disabled

  app:
    depends_on: {}
    environment:
      SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE: pro
      SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL: jdbc:mysql://${EXTERNAL_MYSQL_HOST}:${EXTERNAL_MYSQL_PORT:-3306}/${EXTERNAL_MYSQL_DB:-surveyking}?rewriteBatchedStatements=true&useUnicode=true&characterEncoding=UTF-8&useSSL=false&allowPublicKeyRetrieval=true&serverTimezone=Asia/Shanghai
      SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME: ${EXTERNAL_MYSQL_USER:-surveyking}
      SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD: ${EXTERNAL_MYSQL_PASSWORD}
      SPRING_DATASOURCE_DRIVER_CLASS_NAME: com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver
    # 外部数据库不走 docker 内部网络，需要用 host 网络或确保能访问
    extra_hosts:
      - "host.docker.internal:host-gateway"
